subject: More, Less, or the Same?

body:
| | | It's Glenn Grothman – _**Can you feel the shift? **_ Across the country, folks are feeling more optimistic about the future of our incredible country with President Trump returning to the White House and Republicans in control of Congress. I want to know how you're feeling...

[**MORE OPTIMISTIC**](http://links.arenawins.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=f240a9a4f7e44d10b2275ae4f2f11568&_e=Lx0fnCsQatIfb_BToA5sL137mwfxT_2GvjYguoiAl3H96tu81RL6E3hSlKBsaOirvfnvTlmmwXQt47qLd7n_1A-Rzia89YQgGIlxVoVXcK8A7wKkGc4FRKv62HjlkCWaSfn4JvJ5Dir3rjAQ5AbUUxU38HVUGfI7_8qXKBtsio9q5_yIHIk9HaKfXPQftJVD7r2nM66Nlr16Vqfuyjo3qc8N1MhjeGol9g7HysgSi9qxP6CbR__k2f-L-x9tsO8D5qkT4jPaN82IY8q6vue4PhTgMWyzDLMCFAwRu6pO5T1dlJpcxTDlQc2tKcrq8HqOVmvxQvLQUQYsSIsaoLPwUg%3D%3D)

# **A SPECIAL CHRISTMAS GIFT**

**Friend,**

My team just showed me these **MAGA CHRISTMAS STOCKINGS** and I needed to send them to my TOP 1% of SUPPORTERS before anyone else!
After **OUR HISTORIC VICTORY** , we went all out!

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: Time is running out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’re running out of time.
⏰ Time is running out ⏰ Pennsylvania voters’ voices must be heard — and we’re running out of time. **[Please split a contribution between Bob Casey and Lucas Kunce to power our work.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84242?refcode=em20241116-8674&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8674%2E614464%2Eg6qAEG)** **[Add a donation →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84242?refcode=em20241116-8674&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8674%2E614464%2Eg6qAEG)**
---
Peter,
We won’t stop fighting to ensure that every Pennsylvanian’s voice is heard. With a razor-thin margin and tens of thousands of votes left to count, we need resources ASAP.
The fight for Pennsylvania’s Senate seat is still on, but time is running out. Our team is working hard to ensure Bob Casey stays in the Senate fighting for us.
**[Help us fund the fight in Pennsylvania’s critical Senate race. All eyes are on us, and we can’t back down from this fight. Split $10 between Bob Casey and Lucas Kunce now to fuel our efforts:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84242?refcode=em20241116-8674&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8674%2E614464%2Eg6qAEG)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
| | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=76487d1210304778bff94bc0e44ef907&_e=PdyzBc79a2dVfn_vK6TkATsGd5x0EnRv-Dd65YEjMlUtNbap6DQvCnePZccBpCYU_8BOPOtugYsq_R4PIORazzujq_Uen6Bz1eDX-IEsWl-6sVlF1to6diIfXeHq9L4ugqf_zGQdmuwsQa-V2LHmdMUq-LXEZp_3CElrLeOSC-bp7483P637BGvk_ydfi_0V9krQ_AAxViYxlqZwTz1Hc6BOwKB7YQ4oSuSBBJqE2V7w05TA1Tg4ivu0M9QL3FeSAHt1HPC4bNVFwsKOp-bJ4uWd56pge4gPV3tdDgGtsS3sToU-UTl-CsyLpYaA7QvXTDHTwUamVzjSotyk5ypTvtKvmr_RnjLHEgUBjUWeRccKgDYd0N1kP10teirCGI8h2REKmxHgPJYebZptLlI7pv0qXQ5gi3BV_S4nGjx4VD9LB5ButbudO_AVxP9-aWzn5yIF75mPUqf6NCJtHJgvW1NsOfOhZbwDdPvcQYPNYbqZuH3P7X61jFYVU5hMrtIj8SJqNjza0tkZSbVFa3yXVQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter, I owe you another update. It’s been a very busy few weeks here in Washington since the election. I’ve met and spoken with President Trump several times already and our new class of Republican freshmen members are arriving to prepare for work. After dragging on as long as they could, Democrats are finally coming to terms that Republicans will retain a strong majority in the House! **[**We are more determined than ever, but the battle is just beginning. Our mission is threefold:**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=76487d1210304778bff94bc0e44ef907&_e=PdyzBc79a2dVfn_vK6TkATsGd5x0EnRv-Dd65YEjMlUtNbap6DQvCnePZccBpCYU_8BOPOtugYsq_R4PIORazzujq_Uen6Bz1eDX-IEsWl-6sVlF1to6diIfXeHq9L4ugqf_zGQdmuwsQa-V2LHmdMUq-LXEZp_3CElrLeOSC-bp7483P637BGvk_ydfi_0V9krQ_AAxViYxlqZwTz1Hc6BOwKB7YQ4oSuSBBJqE2V7w05TA1Tg4ivu0M9QL3FeSAHt1HPC4bNVFwsKOp-bJ4uWd56pge4gPV3tdDgGtsS3sToU-UTl-CsyLpYaA7QvXTDHTwUamVzjSotyk5ypTvtKvmr_RnjLHEgUBjUWeRccKgDYd0N1kP10teirCGI8hL5Bv_8CaqRJ5xfWY6Sk-znxlj5HgH0ON6z4RYP5xdGCrLx9A2csx26T1t9ppQ2IpMete-gpKmjplBY2nh824TxnEm3fEJrivVwM-WqODO_hxhdedGVvcgQsX7ZlxtQ8WusheDTBkhBMUNPPMD4AbUw%3D%3D)**
1. Deliver on President Trump’s America First agenda

2. Win the special elections for seats vacated by Trump administration appointees

3. Defend and grow the House majority in the midterms so President Trump has a Republican Congress ALL FOUR YEAR of his administration

---
[**CHIP IN >> SUPPORT PRES. TRUMP**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=76487d1210304778bff94bc0e44ef907&_e=PdyzBc79a2dVfn_vK6TkATsGd5x0EnRv-Dd65YEjMlUtNbap6DQvCnePZccBpCYU_8BOPOtugYsq_R4PIORazzujq_Uen6Bz1eDX-IEsWl-6sVlF1to6diIfXeHq9L4ugqf_zGQdmuwsQa-V2LHmdMUq-LXEZp_3CElrLeOSC-bp7483P637BGvk_ydfi_0V9krQ_AAxViYxlqZwTz1Hc6BOwKB7YQ4oSuSBBJqE2V7w05TA1Tg4ivu0M9QL3FeSAHt1HPC4bNVFwsKOp-bJ4uWd56pge4gPV3tdDgGtsS3sToU-UTl-CsyLpYaA7QvXTDHTwUamVzjSotyk5ypTvtKvmr_RnjLHEgUBjUWeRccKgDYd0N1kP10teirCGI8hyU6v2-jF5ZnXTPZZ0J1NNV0l76sJ-GfzZ3vZYvFj0YCPvC5jh3bUMGZsgA9e9TXEDr--l-t456A_HYJL1LBs7sL7jHEvX3S-SbbOisemKoj59JviTHFC_a_I3PSgWmjbx3kETjESvi7Y5OGq9EWqIQ%3D%3D)

name: Pastor Paula White
subject: Help set Trump’s priorities
body:
TRUMP! TRUMP! TRUMP!
| | | | ******[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=65ba3c14ad884aa0b32ba1e22fe93418&_e=2LlSEqUyl8VZFbiAAOnao_DDgvM4yFAR6fCLYZF6uGAnYnDtlNFT92J22On5hc8JJ92B-7dSvS5E6oGaKCFafk3Xh_HUUFmCIfpF4b31dfyT58XD4WQnVHgzcrGUAajwaC2eg2fMajjOj7H2pnYHyPaepfiZ2oetG1ol25nIWba8M-RRRc_ijiaGxWz8sRYR_0VR_6O8s6hha5o-CDaXkXxJvU-W5WTs2gscerNYkJ1z1V0pYNfG43kouzuL0OtWrrZ1s6_5ZKLtF5n6-DV00A1fSOgx6hbQobtktsBp-Eo2GtnvWyu8d7Jn17OF7f2hXuEXBA-dGwt8un5cbA2LjJD-LBN5dH4C7mU5sugscyoYBiUZu109HUnQeVVk_lhPtFYMfyaxs6yCOIuq3H5D7Q%3D%3D)******
**BREAKING NEWS: PRESIDENT TRUMP WON!**
Peter, I invite you to join me, Pastor Paula White, and the National Faith Advisory Board in the crucial mission to defend our faith.
I'm calling on you to join our Inaugural Faith Committee. Together, we can help set the agenda for President Trump's second term. Through prayer and unity, we can shape a future rooted in faith, and make sure our priorities are put FIRST!
[JOIN THE INAUGURAL FAITH COMMITTEE](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=65ba3c14ad884aa0b32ba1e22fe93418&_e=2LlSEqUyl8VZFbiAAOnao_DDgvM4yFAR6fCLYZF6uGAnYnDtlNFT92J22On5hc8JJ92B-7dSvS5E6oGaKCFafk3Xh_HUUFmCIfpF4b31dfyT58XD4WQnVHgzcrGUAajwaC2eg2fMajjOj7H2pnYHyPaepfiZ2oetG1ol25nIWba8M-RRRc_ijiaGxWz8sRYR_0VR_6O8s6hha5o-CDaXkXxJvU-W5WTs2gscerNYkJ1z1V0pYNfG43kouzuL0OtWrJObvBY2F0jwSFtiGVLJbE1ydHPxeDwfH-zJya0_shbtKsjMlShbmiJ41n_IYrOBZZ5Mqmh3Ub59t79C0vFJtMQCGg3bByGdVhFYwIQR_NGIv3GtVpuYoSAL0EfAdX1xtbGDO7uN04Nlk3kkiBVgAw%3D%3D)
As President Trump's personal pastor, I have witnessed firsthand his unwavering commitment to defending our faith. During his first term, he championed religious freedom, and now, as he prepares for his second, it is up to us to set the agenda.
**Will you join our Inaugural Faith Committee?**
******[YES!](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=65ba3c14ad884aa0b32ba1e22fe93418&_e=2LlSEqUyl8VZFbiAAOnao_DDgvM4yFAR6fCLYZF6uGAnYnDtlNFT92J22On5hc8JJ92B-7dSvS5E6oGaKCFafk3Xh_HUUFmCIfpF4b31dfyT58XD4WQnVHgzcrGUAajwaC2eg2fMajjOj7H2pnYHyPaepfiZ2oetG1ol25nIWba8M-RRRc_ijiaGxWz8sRYR_0VR_6O8s6hha5o-CDaXkXxJvU-W5WTs2gscerNYkJ1z1V0pYNfG43kouzuL0OtWULpllEeanaHWQJzhVDdTKTQJqIZR7rcbwFfS2dRwQeS3WooepKN7rcDaYIE9CWsnHMx5EFhpSk3TTh_ghCJdOURA3rP0FFyV8eD0WFd-wmOa6OLDjWUq34NgNDhiXNUX9QD8pKwJvx87GCIxHmfMlw%3D%3D)** **** President Trump stood for us in this election; now, let us stand for him. The power of our collective voice can influence government policies and create generational change. Join us in this mission of hope and resilience.
We need to make sure we provide him with the resources he needs to represent People of Faith in his second term. [**I 'm going to share this list of priorities with him, so PLEASE make sure I have your response by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT! >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=65ba3c14ad884aa0b32ba1e22fe93418&_e=2LlSEqUyl8VZFbiAAOnao_DDgvM4yFAR6fCLYZF6uGAnYnDtlNFT92J22On5hc8JJ92B-7dSvS5E6oGaKCFafk3Xh_HUUFmCIfpF4b31dfyT58XD4WQnVHgzcrGUAajwaC2eg2fMajjOj7H2pnYHyPaepfiZ2oetG1ol25nIWba8M-RRRc_ijiaGxWz8sRYR_0VR_6O8s6hha5o-CDaXkXxJvU-W5WTs2gscerNYkJ1z1V0pYNfG43kouzuL0OtWqAEEZ5IBvY0B4_Sfu3hnFFGt078nVOc9Dtxf2ls0BO_m5b_yb7qbzFlJc6eO0o3Cy1EhEdCsfdpg9m4xWUqLvUtUL1v32T6lECJWn0WohUZhWAHuAv5IWEpjn9xPodJlWSh9iR4rgXwufIajHT5sFQ%3D%3D)
In faith and unity,
Pastor Paula White National Faith Advisory Board

Copyright (C) National Faith Advisory Board, All rights reserved. 505 E. McCormick Rd
Apopka, FL 32703
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by National Faith Advisory Board. ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=65ba3c14ad884aa0b32ba1e22fe93418&_t=xtgUsNlN2X79wQbng3vtDr_Qv_t9ewQa9TCbjrPfDPKbas08pqfkhBxJJoYnfMZrhv9uy-DvPXR0Kv2hMxZWPRmxlzWG7W6nr8OlkUbKf-b2CPNVxCkFlfOBUtbG8GHXSHob-LlJiNrWXHYdjwDBTr4srm77UrqncCm995x0GbA%3D)
[Unsubscribe from all communications. ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=65ba3c14ad884aa0b32ba1e22fe93418&_t=xtgUsNlN2X79wQbng3vtDr_Qv_t9ewQa9TCbjrPfDPKbas08pqfkhBxJJoYnfMZrhv9uy-DvPXR0Kv2hMxZWPRmxlzWG7W6nr8OlkUbKf-b2CPNVxCkFlfOBUtbG8GHXSHob-LlJiNrWXHYdjwDBTr4srm77UrqncCm995x0GbA%3D)

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Our values, our families, and our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97207680/512674299/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241116_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTE4OTUxMC04OWE0LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=otHDI4O1vl4a7WQ2Fni6niTj2aiZJnbvQb-4u04EAv0=&emci=201ae283-82a4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=11189510-89a4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=252045)
---
In the wake of Donald Trump’s election win and a wave of extreme cabinet nominations, I want to make this abundantly clear: I will never stop standing up for our values, our families, and our future. As we face the prospect of President-Elect Donald Trump and his administration pushing an extreme and divisive agenda, I remain deeply committed to protecting the progress we've made, including:
* Defending reproductive rights and protecting access to healthcare
* Preserving our public lands
* Creating more economic opportunities for working families
* Reducing the cost of prescription drugs
* Expanding health care for veterans
* Passing historic climate legislation
* Making once-in-a-generation investments in infrastructure
* Securing the most meaningful gun safety measures in three decades

Our fight to create a better, brighter future for New Mexico and our country is far from over. I will work with leaders from both parties to find common ground on the issues that matter most to New Mexicans — without compromising our core values or leaving our communities behind. **[Our work for progress is year-round. If you are in this fight with me to stand up to extremism and advocate for progress, will you add your name to my petition?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97207681/512674300/164498878?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241116_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTE4OTUxMC04OWE0LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=otHDI4O1vl4a7WQ2Fni6niTj2aiZJnbvQb-4u04EAv0=&emci=201ae283-82a4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=11189510-89a4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=252045)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97207682/512674301/164498878?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241116_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTE4OTUxMC04OWE0LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=otHDI4O1vl4a7WQ2Fni6niTj2aiZJnbvQb-4u04EAv0=&emci=201ae283-82a4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=11189510-89a4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=252045)
---
Thank you,
Martin
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: The next generation needs this
body:
We’re in a moment of national reflection.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zidh0g6b916ckfrdu0kg8jh7t11kbud856ud4hug_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3j6eor6c5h2bs)
---
Friend, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--_for the better_. **Friend, over the past year, I wrote my new book,****_Right Wing Revolution,_****as a guide for a return to an America where ...**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

_[**Can I send you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****to read today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA --and our critically important work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z90sthfnm76hntvdq71n9gp56ejdrlegru7nm220_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3j6eor6c5h2bs)_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7227c9pfntknsm142mbd3ccai6dgklgaqll2i38_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3j6eor6c5h2bs)
---
Friend, I'm proud to say that _Right Wing Revolution_ is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before:
* It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right.

* It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American.

* It's NOT a call for __ our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on __ how _all Americans_ can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving _ourselves_.

**I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE.** _**[All I ask for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help support Turning Point USA's work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z20or55huk4o754or9mdt4g0af1cg26jad20a6r0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3j6eor6c5h2bs)**_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlc9dogtv1bnk6s01kd582qrpkjn7u4n4vlnrtag_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3j6eor6c5h2bs)
---
In this defining moment for America's future, let's come together in a spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in AMERICAN GREATNESS to find all that's possible in the days ahead. Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued support of Turning Point USA. For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [Renew, Rebrand, Resist](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151766805&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNzY2ODA1LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE4MjEzNDUsImV4cCI6MTczNDQxMzM0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.AUWjP9NjOlddh-FTN9bhW42xiKHWGsk9NkfxSgs8TY4)

| Nov 17

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a49ec887-1851-4f0a-b098-421338a520a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
St. Lawrence County, New York
As [Tom DiNapoli](https://substack.com/redirect/9e9a0995-1edd-4ada-8b41-be9f5d879195?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) frequently says, "It's not easy being a Democrat in these rural counties."
I gave myself permission to take the rest of the week off after the November 5, 2024 election. And here it is, November 16...still navigating my days gently.
In the last few days, I've been busy, for sure. For starters, my team moved back to their respective spaces in New York City, the apartment needed cleaning, and I needed to catch up with online assignments that my students at [Pace Law School](https://substack.com/redirect/1c538d45-7921-43a8-9865-2ea7e7793b4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) had submitted over the prior two weeks. Did I mention that I still teach at Pace? I teach one class, on Cannabis Law and Policy. It's actually a highlight of my week.
I interviewed new teams, and remain hopeful that I can strike up an agreement early next week. I'm not talking about boots-on-the-ground team members. Not sure when and how I will staff the events, calendar, and driving tasks, but that will come later. At the moment I am taking it one step at a time.
To renew, I reconnected with friends. I went for walks. I cooked and ate good food. I slept. Tomorrow I'm going to a concert at the [Crane School of Music in Potsdam](https://substack.com/redirect/ae847c4f-e064-4a19-8aeb-0d2fc7e68de5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And I mentally moved back into my own mind and body. It's been awhile since I've had free time.
I read about the need for Democrats to rebrand. At first I cringed; I bring a voice -- not a brand. I advocate -- I don't market. But I warmed up to the idea. We somehow need to message our ideas better.
And I will resist. I will resist within my own party, as we dissect and defuse. I will resist against things like the appointment of [Lee Zeldin, noted champion of deregulation, is appointed to head up the Environmental Protection Agency](https://substack.com/redirect/7127e177-293a-4061-844d-e96088ea66f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I'll spare you the other names on the Bingo card. Maybe Maddow will start her deck of cards like she had in Trump 1.0.
Those three Rs: renew, rebrand, and resist, form the core of my new platform.
I need to connect with the voter who really doesn't care -- they can't care because they don't have capacity to care -- for anything else except putting food on the table, gas in the car, and keeping a roof over their head.
The millionaires and billionaires that are going to Congress also can't care because they don't have capacity to care. If my voters talked to Elon Musk about putting gas in the car, he would scream at them that they should just buy a Tesla. Never mind that most parts of the district lack infrastructure to charge.
Ah Elon! Maureen Dowd is calling you the new work wife, ["Elonia"](https://substack.com/redirect/920711bf-9d58-48be-a228-f1461d8f7658?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I'm writing more, and will be rolling out some new material soon.
Perhaps more relevant: [I completely re-did my website](https://substack.com/redirect/6aa68c15-399b-46a5-9996-83ac2cd937d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). There's even video content and a merch shop. Please let me know what you think.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _
[Pledge your support](https://substack..zDsCr91JVTsUucIPucQHdhdGEEQ-s9BTjV5X4m_d62s?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151766805)

clean_body: I'm talking to the voter who needs to put food on the table, gas in the car, and keep a roof over his head. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race * I'm talking to the voter who needs to put food on the table, gas in the car, and keep a roof over his head. | | | Nov 17 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- St. Lawrence County, New York As frequently says, "It's not easy being a Democrat in these rural counties." I gave myself permission to take the rest of the week off after the November 5, 2024 election. And here it is, November 16...still navigating my days gently. In the last few days, I've been busy, for sure. For starters, my team moved back to their respective spaces in New York City, the apartment needed cleaning, and I needed to catch up with online assignments that my students at had submitted over the prior two weeks. Did I mention that I still teach at Pace? I teach one class, on Cannabis Law and Policy. It's actually a highlight of my week. I interviewed new teams, and remain hopeful that I can strike up an agreement early next week. I'm not talking about boots-on-the-ground team members. Not sure when and how I will staff the events, calendar, and driving tasks, but that will come later. At the moment I am taking it one step at a time. To renew, I reconnected with friends. I went for walks. I cooked and ate good food. I slept. Tomorrow I'm going to a concert at the . And I mentally moved back into my own mind and body. It's been awhile since I've had free time. I read about the need for Democrats to rebrand. At first I cringed; I bring a voice -- not a brand. I advocate -- I don't market. But I warmed up to the idea. We somehow need to message our ideas better. And I will resist. I will resist within my own party, as we dissect and defuse. I will resist against things like the appointment of . I'll spare you the other names on the Bingo card. Maybe Maddow will start her deck of cards like she had in Trump 1.0. Those three Rs: renew, rebrand, and resist, form the core of my new platform. I need to connect with the voter who really doesn't care -- they can't care because they don't have capacity to care -- for anything else except putting food on the table, gas in the car, and keeping a roof over their head. The millionaires and billionaires that are going to Congress also can't care because they don't have capacity to care. If my voters talked to Elon Musk about putting gas in the car, he would scream at them that they should just buy a Tesla. Never mind that most parts of the district lack infrastructure to charge. Ah Elon! Maureen Dowd is calling you the new work wife, . I'm writing more, and will be rolling out some new material soon. Perhaps more relevant: . There's even video content and a merch shop. Please let me know what you think. If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Paula Collins 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Alan Cohn
subject: We need Equal Justice Under Law!
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97207780/512674815/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDgyYTc1MmItYTlhNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O106FdN2qWocUc2VJOAkBug4d-2vyD74jhYWZnNq2j0=&emci=4ea3bff5-a4a4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=482a752b-a9a4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
Are you tired of the non-stop calls, emails, and text messages from candidates and campaigns?
So are we!
But that’s not going to change until we change how we fund our politics, and if you want to know who’s responsible, it’s the Supreme Court.
In 2010, SCOTUS ruled in the case “Citizens United” corporations are people and money is free speech.
Big corporations are free to dole out millions, primarily to Republicans. Democrats need to harass individual contributors like you.
The only way to change that is to retire the radical MAGA majority on the Supreme Court.
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign working with 75 members of Congress, including Hakeem Jeffries and Adam Schiff, to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and enact 18-year term limits.
We’re already back to work. We’re raising resources to back candidates in the midterms pledging to support the TERM ACT, and we’re about to mount a major public pressure campaign to force Congress to act.
But we need majorities in the House and Senate. And we need you to join our movement!
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97207781/512674816/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDgyYTc1MmItYTlhNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O106FdN2qWocUc2VJOAkBug4d-2vyD74jhYWZnNq2j0=)
Polls show over 70% of Americans support our cause.
[**> >>The MAGA majority has already robbed women of the right to make their own healthcare decisions. Help us retire Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito. Help us restore SCOTUS to its mission of “Equal Justice under Law.”**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97207782/512674817/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDgyYTc1MmItYTlhNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O106FdN2qWocUc2VJOAkBug4d-2vyD74jhYWZnNq2j0=)
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97207783/512674818/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDgyYTc1MmItYTlhNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O106FdN2qWocUc2VJOAkBug4d-2vyD74jhYWZnNq2j0=)**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97207784/512674819/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDgyYTc1MmItYTlhNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O106FdN2qWocUc2VJOAkBug4d-2vyD74jhYWZnNq2j0=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/N1QLF-00IU-8QtNLZ4r3pA~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpHHWqP0TeaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3JlY291bnQtYmF0dGxlcy1kbS1hZWRnZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlZGdlX25yc2NfRUFUJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTExM19uYV9yZWNvdW50c25vdG92ZXJzbXMtdjFfRUFUX25yc2NfbnJzYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1mdW5kcmFpc2luZyZhbXRwb3NpdGlvbj00JmFtdDQ9MTAwJnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlVwNzcGNCCmc3IYc5Z6GIbolSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

Friend, thanks to YOU, we won back the Senate.

Your support fueled our movement, kept our ads running, supported our field teams, and delivered a **[Republican Senate Majority!](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/N1QLF-00IU-8QtNLZ4r3pA~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpHHWqP0TeaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3JlY291bnQtYmF0dGxlcy1kbS1hZWRnZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlZGdlX25yc2NfRUFUJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTExM19uYV9yZWNvdW50c25vdG92ZXJzbXMtdjFfRUFUX25yc2NfbnJzYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1mdW5kcmFpc2luZyZhbXRwb3NpdGlvbj00JmFtdDQ9MTAwJnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlVwNzcGNCCmc3IYc5Z6GIbolSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Together, we've ensured that Chuck Schumer will not have power -- and that President Trump will have an America First majority to get to work for Americans next year.

But our work isn't over.

**[--> In PA, Dave McCormick is hanging on but facing a possible recount.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/N1QLF-00IU-8QtNLZ4r3pA~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpHHWqP0TeaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3JlY291bnQtYmF0dGxlcy1kbS1hZWRnZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlZGdlX25yc2NfRUFUJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTExM19uYV9yZWNvdW50c25vdG92ZXJzbXMtdjFfRUFUX25yc2NfbnJzYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1mdW5kcmFpc2luZyZhbXRwb3NpdGlvbj00JmFtdDQ9MTAwJnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlVwNzcGNCCmc3IYc5Z6GIbolSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Here at the NRSC, we're preparing to send field teams to all of these states to offer support -- and we're preparing for a legal fight.

As you know, recounts are expensive and Democrats are going to do everything they can to stop us.

_**[Our ask today is that you'll pitch in just $10 to support this critical effort. Make your donation to the NRSC's Emergency Legal Fund here: NRSCEmergencyLegalFund/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/N1QLF-00IU-8QtNLZ4r3pA~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpHHWqP0TeaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3JlY291bnQtYmF0dGxlcy1kbS1hZWRnZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlZGdlX25yc2NfRUFUJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTExM19uYV9yZWNvdW50c25vdG92ZXJzbXMtdjFfRUFUX25yc2NfbnJzYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1mdW5kcmFpc2luZyZhbXRwb3NpdGlvbj00JmFtdDQ9MTAwJnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlVwNzcGNCCmc3IYc5Z6GIbolSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**_

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Stand up for our founding principles
body:
Most Americans know very little about America’s founding.

| | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z4qfmn1846rs2p785u2bog3c7kavu47vu4mh4o2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj3chh2bs)
---

[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zvq52rin9eocjuer4dlf8fu9p3b5160pccifuc70_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj3chh2bs) Fellow Conservative,

Most Americans know very little about America's founding.

In today's public schools, instead of learning about our Founding Fathers and the U.S. Constitution's principles, they are brainwashed with transgender ideology.

At The Heritage Foundation, we're dedicated to creating conservative policy solutions that will defend and sustain our republic. But if our country is to survive, the American people must know our founding principles and the history that brought it about.

**That 's why my team at The Heritage Foundation is also committed to teaching the public about American history and our Founding Fathers. **

We published our _Founders' Almanac_ for this exact purpose.

This informative book contains biographical essays about our Founding Fathers like George Washington, Benjamin Franklin, and John Adams along with insightful analysis of primary sources like the Declaration of Independence, the United States Constitution, and Washington's Farewell Address.

**To help further your knowledge of American history, I 'd like to offer you a free digital copy of Heritage's _Founders' Almanac_.**

**You can download your free copy using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/get-your-free-founders-almanac-ebook/](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z4vi1bltfen7bmmlmo8t5uagh59o7ltvobm75rdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj3chh2bs)**

Please use this guide to increase your knowledge of American history and stand up for our founding principles.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Update For America

_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z98ovq1v16vki49uaai56tc1ccrd6d18av292kmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj5clh2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi6nja6p5lvgifpfmigkr57uda1mmt634fm54fk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj5clh2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znldranlbamsvjvfm8iv99t207l3uqj20c5hmm8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj5clh2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1joimlib4sdjub809hlpdu534onfqt20coull50_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj5clh2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp1cji4jupklqjm9jqd4i5mgghqam6s9ha4muji8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj5clh2bs)
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: The Patriotic Roadmap I Wrote for You
body:
We’re in a moment of national reflection.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0bs9lpqs0s57ghfp7gplu13j6c2vjdaphoek198_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj1cph2bs)
---
Friend, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--_for the better_. **Friend, over the past year, I wrote my new book,****_Right Wing Revolution,_****as a guide for a return to an America where ...**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

_[**Can I send you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****to read today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA --and our critically important work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3d2367sj925bfj0qqhkf47cc2u0r74u719ape18_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj1cph2bs)_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z90etjollia4k65fsgtogbh425oq2r6o84hpe3jo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj1cph2bs)
---
Friend, I'm proud to say that _Right Wing Revolution_ is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before:
* It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right.

* It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American.

* It's NOT a call for __ our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on __ how _all Americans_ can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving _ourselves_.

**I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE.** _**[All I ask for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help support Turning Point USA's work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4c7a19sprq4lh8eaouv9cgk7nn24tank4kbinno_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj1cph2bs)**_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj1mc61mfunt85gbb4fjc7i3nf5ceg7nuf2cmqn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj1cph2bs)
---
In this defining moment for America's future, let's come together in a spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in AMERICAN GREATNESS to find all that's possible in the days ahead. Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued support of Turning Point USA. For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsb63tmfp6ekppjid6u2m9g71540ib140dkvksc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj1cph2bs)
---

name: NRSC HQ
subject: Thank you, Elon Musk!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Add your name to our thank you card

[Thank you, Elon Musk!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1aa4fvnls4jh51i9nf8j9ovl01t552km7vvdefo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj5chh2bs)

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq1ccc9i26o7iqiht69emmcenbmfeistjs06c8po_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj5chh2bs)

Fellow American,

Thanks to supporters like you, and allies like Elon Musk, we're _**[celebrating a huge victory](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdpi6ab8pssae55559pej5nv0oren9hp4n69h458_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj5chh2bs)**_ as Donald Trump has been elected the 47th President of the United States.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Marxism—New Documentary Course
body:
Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlg8kedifducubcgt4c8pavfi1huerqrm9igvi68_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj5chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

**I 'm excited to let you know about our free documentary course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."**

Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization."

I know you're not fooled by these disguises.

Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses **because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx.**

It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country.

It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God.

And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities.

The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally _new_ about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact...

**... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. **

That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty.

[**You can do that by registering for "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zafbahon7oj2suur9j3rmubnet6d5nsvr06si1pg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj5chh2bs)

Or you can send this to a friend!

This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture.

**Will you join us by registering for this free online course?** You can click on the secure link below to register and get access today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5j5dhoj204lc1d9jjl5jcuqj0dfvukurv0gj9bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj5chh2bs)

Most colleges and universities work to indoctrinate young people with Marxism.

That's why taking this course and making it available to as many Americans as possible will be one of the most important ways you will defend liberty in America.

You're one of the reasons why we can defend liberty by producing and promoting courses like "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--so thank you so much for all you do.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. We've released one of our most important free documentary courses this month..."Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"! You can register for this course at the secure link below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z43adsc5g9ou792liq3gla4nbuf8hmi5ail07gh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm8oj5chh2bs)

**Marxism currently hides behind many names ...CRT, gender ideology, or even calls for decolonization...but it's still the same Marxism that seeks to destroy your rights.**

**You can stand up to this dangerous ideology by registering for this free documentary course today!** **
**

---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zd6hm9h2b7g3g7nsa12vjqfno318avaf7pv46858_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gmco32cdh2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zn8gnjljjsst83i6qq1csnh93lq6f0292leelkq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gmco32cdh2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zb1u5khjvqgd97766nkerskgrkab4iravlij04v8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gmco32cdh2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkld118bmrhgomtd5ui1ei730492fpdnsj5j88m0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gmco32cdh2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf1uurhvkolfeui09dvr2mdcj0snadpif9pfqkro_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gmco32cdh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3gio9u65vnfpnijt0ndv06bm7svgtaju1ec4k38_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gmco32cdh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---

clean_body: Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I 'm excited to let you know about our free documentary course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism." Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization." I know you're not fooled by these disguises. Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx. It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country. It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God. And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities. The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally new about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact... ... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty. Or you can send this to a friend! This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture. Will you join us by registering for this free online course? name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Stand up for our founding principles
body:
Most Americans know very little about America’s founding.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq6o1g3rhvgpk5j4o33c6c97meb7sml17iiqppe8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gmcp70cth2bs)
---

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zepnsgr18rbaajtkdott3s3p3uln3iu9v57n8ego_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gmcp70cth2bs) Fellow Conservative,

Most Americans know very little about America's founding.

In today's public schools, instead of learning about our Founding Fathers and the U.S. Constitution's principles, they are brainwashed with transgender ideology.

At The Heritage Foundation, we're dedicated to creating conservative policy solutions that will defend and sustain our republic. But if our country is to survive, the American people must know our founding principles and the history that brought it about.

**That 's why my team at The Heritage Foundation is also committed to teaching the public about American history and our Founding Fathers. **

We published our _Founders' Almanac_ for this exact purpose.

This informative book contains biographical essays about our Founding Fathers like George Washington, Benjamin Franklin, and John Adams along with insightful analysis of primary sources like the Declaration of Independence, the United States Constitution, and Washington's Farewell Address.

**To help further your knowledge of American history, I 'd like to offer you a free digital copy of Heritage's _Founders' Almanac_.**

**You can download your free copy using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/get-your-free-founders-almanac-ebook/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zahecslag0dtann13s61ek5j4g8i3q4pm4gqjjv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gmcp70cth2bs)**

Please use this guide to increase your knowledge of American history and stand up for our founding principles.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

body:

| | | Friend,

The 2024 election was just the beginning. As we look to the future, we need to take a minute to understand the magnitude of this election. That's why we're conducting our **[Official 2024 Exit Poll](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6mkoei6n438rnd38r7gtd39t6p85i99m82ol2og_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm2o72c9h2bs "Official 2024 Exit Poll")** , and we're inviting you to participate.

We need steadfast Patriots to complete their Exit Poll, and _I instantly thought of you, Friend_. **Your input on this is absolutely invaluable to maintaining our records and keeping House Republicans in fighting shape.**

This is your chance to help us create a brighter future for America. _Your input will be kept confidential and anonymous_ , but it will have a big impact on our strategy moving forward.

**Please submit your response before midnight tonight.**

name: NRSC HQ
subject: Thank you, Elon Musk!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Add your name to our thank you card

[Thank you, Elon Musk!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0b9mltug8s1pmiuck67ja21oar6etdtvss3ebjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm2o72c1h2bs)

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z95sh1up3hnjvrdsst31h47d0bp2vmfbmmtrupa0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm2o72c1h2bs)

Fellow American,

Thanks to supporters like you, and allies like Elon Musk, we're _**[celebrating a huge victory](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zre9m01rbv42kkafntjcltuujrefkhj7e8a8nv3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3gm2o72c1h2bs)**_ as Donald Trump has been elected the 47th President of the United States.

We want to thank Elon for his unwavering support by sending him a thank you card signed by MAGA supporters like you, Friend.

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: The Founders' Almanac
body:
Most Americans know very little about America’s founding.

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QiH-UVOCMgiZ_baWxyN7JQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpHEXkP0SlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhlcml0YWdlLm9yZy9nZXQteW91ci1mcmVlLWZvdW5kZXJzLWFsbWFuYWMtZWJvb2svP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1mb3VuZGVyc2FsbWFuYWMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWltYWdlX0FFLVJPTjU4MDMwVwNzcGNCCmc3RK85Z6YwV_RSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QiH-UVOCMgiZ_baWxyN7JQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpHEXkP0SlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhlcml0YWdlLm9yZy9nZXQteW91ci1mcmVlLWZvdW5kZXJzLWFsbWFuYWMtZWJvb2svP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1mb3VuZGVyc2FsbWFuYWMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWltYWdlX0FFLVJPTjU4MDMwVwNzcGNCCmc3RK85Z6YwV_RSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Fellow Conservative,

Most Americans know very little about America's founding.

In today's public schools, instead of learning about our Founding Fathers and the U.S. Constitution's principles, they are brainwashed with transgender ideology.

At The Heritage Foundation, we're dedicated to creating conservative policy solutions that will defend and sustain our republic. But if our country is to survive, the American people must know our founding principles and the history that brought it about.

**That 's why my team at The Heritage Foundation is also committed to teaching the public about American history and our Founding Fathers. **

We published our _Founders' Almanac_ for this exact purpose.

This informative book contains biographical essays about our Founding Fathers like George Washington, Benjamin Franklin, and John Adams along with insightful analysis of primary sources like the Declaration of Independence, the United States Constitution, and Washington's Farewell Address.

**To help further your knowledge of American history, I 'd like to offer you a free digital copy of Heritage's _Founders' Almanac_.**

**You can download your free copy using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/get-your-free-founders-almanac-ebook/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QiH-UVOCMgiZ_baWxyN7JQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpHEXkP0SlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhlcml0YWdlLm9yZy9nZXQteW91ci1mcmVlLWZvdW5kZXJzLWFsbWFuYWMtZWJvb2svP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1mb3VuZGVyc2FsbWFuYWMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWltYWdlX0FFLVJPTjU4MDMwVwNzcGNCCmc3RK85Z6YwV_RSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Please use this guide to increase your knowledge of American history and stand up for our founding principles.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u9PcMvr7Y-pV22w2LDj7rg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpHEXkP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmc3RK85Z6YwV_RSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xY7noFr0W1rCfO4gjlbJXg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpHEXkP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnN0SvOWemMFf0UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: No More Blue’s Clues Pride Parades
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zir5f4ahjhvlu52i4g1f77eb56tjehjm2sut1390_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3im4o36cph2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd8vkv3k2qq737r0595bi1olj2dr30ivqruu5pk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3im4o36cph2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z05qtnjdmitc92tmcd60gtq32pn4bh1gvd3194do_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3im4o36cph2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr1j47856diq9pgl9s2stkotq9ggjfhbgen01pq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c3im4o36cph2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **

subject: Marxism—New Documentary Course
body:
Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57b16023601d405f842d0fc7f3509442&_e=I-JZrfWewhnOKKV3RZXav2P-wZtzbj_qYgCbH87qBPfEuuVIluDNMPxqD0Fw_58SfhHWSdxQI54eFsryDa8kQheTr3wUGGTN7U6XUqy6PLJ1FXqnJiv8eIODI5qZflkPaM_tLHdrmGfopHaZPse3tNCNx7aWRpwoKqY21KS9Lm09vbNwGheVnPwDLcLuiHS9Ag0HNqLpNx-g0CZ6Ck98fNnkd6ToPul9dy2wQ2IutDOV7OTmXzsLc3xCAccUKFjCh03_6IbmyXgZSLLcMrMSvSZ03Qes5OGscdPf_7qH6gDOopg6p5DHyS3jZai8wuJ3wt6KAkAWjiCFBgcYU7qLlfPUfyk5SOfVa61ClbWEj-PmtL9tYxK7B6zUS2EPxExr48-GlqKIXgLS5lBn7Oopz9qAexAfM9GmXHRzsrsQfM8%3D)

| | Dear Fellow American,

**I 'm excited to let you know about our free documentary course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."**

Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization."

I know you're not fooled by these disguises.

Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses **because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx.**

It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country.

It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God.

And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities.

The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally _new_ about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact...

**... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. **

That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty.

[**You can do that by registering for "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" today.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57b16023601d405f842d0fc7f3509442&_e=I-JZrfWewhnOKKV3RZXav2P-wZtzbj_qYgCbH87qBPfEuuVIluDNMPxqD0Fw_58SfhHWSdxQI54eFsryDa8kQheTr3wUGGTN7U6XUqy6PLJ1FXqnJiv8eIODI5qZflkPaM_tLHdrmGfopHaZPse3tNCNx7aWRpwoKqY21KS9Lm09vbNwGheVnPwDLcLuiHS9Ag0HNqLpNx-g0CZ6Ck98fNnkd6ToPul9dy2wQ2IutDOV7OTmXzsLc3xCAccUKFjCh03_6IbmyXgZSLLcMrMSvUQeLRoj__Y5oEGqY1KhvSvERFyW7R1ESSW9y60v2ow3MVceuB_aXbJuPyITd1qZt9Wm5t-FCtd9QkoPst6CGLuOcsQ9t8jo2VBBDdej-gD0nisj9V8PKj3uCbKCeZpPXUd-S7nB-YUlDIGVI3Sp-jo%3D)

Or you can send this to a friend!

This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture.

**Will you join us by registering for this free online course?** You can click on the secure link below to register and get access today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57b16023601d405f842d0fc7f3509442&_e=I-JZrfWewhnOKKV3RZXav2P-wZtzbj_qYgCbH87qBPfEuuVIluDNMPxqD0Fw_58SfhHWSdxQI54eFsryDa8kQheTr3wUGGTN7U6XUqy6PLJ1FXqnJiv8eIODI5qZflkPaM_tLHdrmGfopHaZPse3tNCNx7aWRpwoKqY21KS9Lm09vbNwGheVnPwDLcLuiHS9Ag0HNqLpNx-g0CZ6Ck98fNnkd6ToPul9dy2wQ2IutDOV7OTmXzsLc3xCAccUKFjCh03_6IbmyXgZSLLcMrMSvVm6BCvPHIPea-PYR9LTerHCge7OpUF7ec5NQn1Ns8OFPtAyaZXauzAKrxnpXApglk_5u8Tp4uwjMQqd_45svBYrRfGAyshsUero-1wp5Ke7peKXzLlqZJ8d3cX8uXaI5X0Q-Pv45IJYJgET1toxhHQ%3D)

Most colleges and universities work to indoctrinate young people with Marxism.

That's why taking this course and making it available to as many Americans as possible will be one of the most important ways you will defend liberty in America.

You're one of the reasons why we can defend liberty by producing and promoting courses like "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--so thank you so much for all you do.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. We've released one of our most important free documentary courses this month..."Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"! You can register for this course at the secure link below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57b16023601d405f842d0fc7f3509442&_e=I-JZrfWewhnOKKV3RZXav2P-wZtzbj_qYgCbH87qBPfEuuVIluDNMPxqD0Fw_58SfhHWSdxQI54eFsryDa8kQheTr3wUGGTN7U6XUqy6PLJ1FXqnJiv8eIODI5qZflkPaM_tLHdrmGfopHaZPse3tNCNx7aWRpwoKqY21KS9Lm09vbNwGheVnPwDLcLuiHS9Ag0HNqLpNx-g0CZ6Ck98fNnkd6ToPul9dy2wQ2IutDOV7OTmXzsLc3xCAccUKFjCh03_6IbmyXgZSLLcMrMSvTDJvqPrYEXSE7lBmxkKMKTN2u-XBLdZrYVUslg8w8Fy5TDl76Rbk2AG2JJoGN2JULaag9hexzvcTlA98NUAWE3ZSB6a_0984TeVkpGos83Wp9z8Q3D-QoGU56UHxD5BQAZP9wRfEI2dcRhid3VQ_DE%3D)

**Marxism currently hides behind many names ...CRT, gender ideology, or even calls for decolonization...but it's still the same Marxism that seeks to destroy your rights.**

**You can stand up to this dangerous ideology by registering for this free documentary course today!** **

| Peter, headlines like these are far too common: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdbffd822-ece5-4f15-8c22-c48218268c3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Democrats had a chance to pass a bill that would have cut down on SCOTUS corruption by improving oversight into justices’ conflicts of interest and requiring the Court to create a rigorous code of ethics – but the GOP blocked it. We need stronger oversight for those responsible for upholding the law and keeping our freedoms safe, Peter. Billionaires should never be able to buy our Supreme Court, especially when so many rights depend on their rulings. [If you agree Congress needs to pass a law demanding the Court create and uphold the highest ethical standards, add your name below:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b38e891-156a-46e8-980b-74604a3c983a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.

| |

Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1adad5ae810488faa16add1a0fc7621&_e=PbVyqM5LKxeFoNAJV8ZSeTEhzDUilsTUcDJ35QPE8oCG8DT3JJcgcOA19cmzISPDMr5PBN1SNoWcrTdKJn2lst8JkwvmCQ5DY9qiKZm0W-2cspbhGfp4ADqBjzSVqV6H18H3mjq7rQWz0IGTZjWSDxYOUyF_qpAPFn7DKmrpgVCsHna1NWxGSF8iuKEG9-SbF6Netl9S6Djd9PaLhtfzyItdK3G0UUvY2YgFSodwx78ZkUC373GTsacv5L6v1-1_0O7IjHxmkTFjHBAReOoh6aRGQMMPyOB9qd8JcM9vw-3hRhmvJIUbPb4l_0uG5Db969-3UYtNQStMGxgnX1qvhOE0f4D8hjPJAYT2UJhu4K09kmJqWLrHli4pzra3GpFp3HARYbDR4UvqwdntJoBJVg%3D%3D)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1adad5ae810488faa16add1a0fc7621&_e=PbVyqM5LKxeFoNAJV8ZSeTEhzDUilsTUcDJ35QPE8oCG8DT3JJcgcOA19cmzISPDMr5PBN1SNoWcrTdKJn2lst8JkwvmCQ5DY9qiKZm0W-2cspbhGfp4ADqBjzSVqV6H18H3mjq7rQWz0IGTZjWSDxYOUyF_qpAPFn7DKmrpgVCsHna1NWxGSF8iuKEG9-SbF6Netl9S6Djd9PaLhtfzyItdK3G0UUvY2YgFSodwx78ZkUC373GTsacv5L6v1-1_vvPNEZLGeELkhiVaInlZ9EmJycn4T24FHnCIYZPTP1e-BtUs64MFMQADA0iWuku7nnKBglOy7ZtbHrFChaQPrSz85HgTsVsOSG81RO-zKiuEV1lh5ovSuYJZJ3YL8ODw_jUhgKAW_c_0Njrv6mnzJw%3D%3D). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1adad5ae810488faa16add1a0fc7621&_e=PbVyqM5LKxeFoNAJV8ZSeTEhzDUilsTUcDJ35QPE8oCG8DT3JJcgcOA19cmzISPDMr5PBN1SNoWcrTdKJn2lst8JkwvmCQ5DY9qiKZm0W-2cspbhGfp4ADqBjzSVqV6H18H3mjq7rQWz0IGTZjWSDxYOUyF_qpAPFn7DKmrpgVCsHna1NWxGSF8iuKEG9-SbF6Netl9S6Djd9PaLhtfzyItdK3G0UUvY2YgFSodwx78ZkUC373GTsacv5L6v1-1_OGQBYeiEUbeaKQfAelVaD26VJ-CYzthDzSVwleHtiiOdWMf7tj5AEEjs4RDaoJc3UE4D_54PO2HCYQiOZSK8rVrp_YL3XmPHOvdVGHu-WCTUAR5wcRKs0hh78NsSQqMEysVh_LcPW4STRN0xz7fFtQ%3D%3D)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Team Steel HQ
subject: TOO close to call!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
This is it.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I need you to read this before it's too late.

**Michelle Steel 's race for CA-45 is _TOO CLOSE TO CALL_** , but please don't lose hope. We can't give up in a time like this. Right now is the time to double down and keep our momentum going.

So, we have just one question for you today: _**[Are you still with us?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a163461539344d7990084aa5797e10d&_e=7crcFYmyS0Cd3NcOnC-jbxfv1QwIIqrVpRl12NKZmx1HjWXp10L1FtySqLOQBNHB9cBcmTmnUo6k3J4Kq58ph4P3_Uzg8EwDCQk50ZZp3pWVN8GIKDYrCUl_mjeWHiZS-9ZYWgQANPdi8RQhwjgCLYSmpafcb-byJcK4hVQipAHtCAwj39bc_Sqbv0o9ztMB5So2InQv_XBPEm6PfKDvuM3A2xPMqljSJarxscDTAkvwGm8ENBXszUJgA7UrZLfPc2suW7rVdm_FedObl5n6bjKpXmILfLWam-UaBjJ7-MSvoyphC5hQMqUjAW6ZK4BaLBAcFa2MOQOqKPZofeziJv8PXAkao-Ou-eXdZMxjXW6Gsa4UMU0_MjwEJWolrlyGs4a9aMf-sQQAlJfbo8C2PHeSrNT9RKHMfadmb6r_arKLTXmc6KGX25kDpj8et9IgQe1NZJaYVy-z3nG-9SsAb4cnhlyWLm_AYIPecvPe7WU%3D "Are you still with us?")**_

We need EVERYONE reading this to act before it's too late.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ed08d87d72b948889027efbedf1b37a4&_e=SZevubmbtwmRl-1rR-u_rpEG21rdnvQzUeE2ZLWaiMWeiPU7KnK70HIfCMKf6NCu4BAUknYqiOapxMqolao9cgHxu7Ew6rQavPNwiCeX7iyFxSk4oU0PNtEVVIUJvteTr77c9JuuXjaloFXpOyEQ_wzRnbAyGmN0DRxLKU4gDlniKVNHbu5uwt-blDU_tnxYgCcXGUPoNc6C7FPYvruGbJ4wAum3TTHe5qm5yI5Ssc3HOHrcwY2Sqw_Loe04SGXN14lGYD1MvQtSJJSfosARZnreQH6EvBvZUcdAg0maNkU9q5NGoNJaVWlerpY7sJ-Tehj30WrheoMnh6L5n-ljsPqLeuN7ECPFK9cXIGH_dqeRB1M_7tSRQC9xqqjIMHgpA2JAkW-jM5cJPrzcDkBJR7zmunhSIt4WhpZ4LM1IyVY%3D)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ed08d87d72b948889027efbedf1b37a4&_e=SZevubmbtwmRl-1rR-u_rpEG21rdnvQzUeE2ZLWaiMWeiPU7KnK70HIfCMKf6NCu4BAUknYqiOapxMqolao9cgHxu7Ew6rQavPNwiCeX7iyFxSk4oU0PNtEVVIUJvteTr77c9JuuXjaloFXpOyEQ_wzRnbAyGmN0DRxLKU4gDlniKVNHbu5uwt-blDU_tnxYgCcXGUPoNc6C7FPYvruGbJ4wAum3TTHe5qm5yI5Ssc3HOHrcwY2Sqw_Loe04SGXNkgVrPrvvYjHOayOx8AGBcUsTj6tROY4zPts60YDVPcilGzL-hz_1W2N4CoWkv-u3biv7GcFUteZJjrlIf27t_e6UKbYeFaZTsRPS2vWfO1Spqc8q1gRnAfq6vPB2FUG1D_CZ3gHKc7yC44GHkuvN0Mr9q-bu3iEk3HJCYYpP3ls%3D)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

name: Mark Jobe, Moody Bible Institute
subject: Can I share this resource with you?
body:
“What sets Today in the Word daily devotionals apart?”

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=97d15813df79407eb793dfbcad55df78&_e=4zcmgG3L_mZm0h0WmgAABXegI8Gv-KzjvH7dQT_UjrgPQDDCZucGf553tPByT_qLEH_Sfg8g1LypRtUF44dySageHlAWC2o_vym31wrckIm8x3aPyCE74DQ7ooLaXS1Q_7OyyAsJLSGRU1EeyanP8H1iRPm5xaym10hGtgCn9IijIb_jeCcf7DHacJiJwehuS5Dq1agq1znlCXcrcVZzi2PKGPNMMzzP_2lmUehyWZzl2BqCEblo2QlwMSy-aQXWpgkM4avzZRzdMiL8aVE43hiLCZptLz5mF_-WwGHTkeFVcTMUXiaCsQPHFoepxs0PAs5GjOsCKsltJaWvIswJa2PuKIhIOOs52XUnp18EIZA%3D)
---
Hi there Friend, ____ Looking for an easier way to study Scripture and grow in your relationship with God? Maybe you want to start your day focused on God's Word or end it by meditating on His promises.

I'm thrilled to share with you a favorite resource of mine from _Today in the Word,_ a ministry of the Moody Bible Institute, that puts curated passages of scripture right at your fingertips along with daily life application opportunities to grow in your walk with the Lord.

You might ask, "What sets _Today in the Word_ daily devotionals apart?"

These Bible studies are crafted by esteemed professors from the Moody Bible Institute, a trusted name in Christian education for over a century. These scholars bring their expertise and passion for God's Word to each devotional, providing you with profound insights and practical applications for your daily life.

By signing up for _Today in the Word_ daily devotionals, you'll receive a fresh, thought-provoking devotional delivered straight to your inbox every morning. It's the perfect way to start your day with biblical wisdom and inspiration.

Join thousands of believers who have already experienced the transformative power of God's Word. Sign up now to begin your journey toward spiritual growth and encouragement!

Ready to dive in?

Get started at the link below. I hope you will join us!

[https://www.todayintheword.org/start-each-day-encouraged](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=97d15813df79407eb793dfbcad55df78&_e=4zcmgG3L_mZm0h0WmgAABXegI8Gv-KzjvH7dQT_UjrgPQDDCZucGf553tPByT_qLEH_Sfg8g1LypRtUF44dySageHlAWC2o_vym31wrckIm8x3aPyCE74DQ7ooLaXS1Q_7OyyAsJLSGRU1EeyanP8H1iRPm5xaym10hGtgCn9IijIb_jeCcf7DHacJiJwehuS5Dq1agq1znlCXcrcVZzi2NwVhK8G7zlySPf18uzFvyq7Q7PKYd51VvfuGh_ZogTFZfSJAuFfyAT0MgxjMiE4NH_uJV9Q17zV7XYKqAbf6HdK6cqS2HeL-Ds1bVMdXFW1BtGK7oiMwrlKsYaT06RODSto5Q8t0_t4FpuZJYO-Jg%3D)

Mark Jobe,
President
Moody Bible Institute

|

body:
Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9869f651bdec4012b22ae243368663cd&_e=Hp4ljM5kazojf9fi5cVoMuOa7gPuEdSmVq6d1Ez0C8NmDWcLz-ycu-1NUnLRAVRG8hIdSpo8YTbTYJJm6tYDi-JEzvWrLfx6s4PsLGyVf3zrUDIbMybLtdGtkEpUqe8aykFPmhfq0K_cvc_TdmCRNINoPHKZ_QV-SOfPMdQF6hhT4zzxd9UAua6aVgpo7KxRp9M8BT7rLHu3CDs4AN9Go1hmfWrGQ1NT1621xAKa7LRlqrqlOm8867jVwgPN5nAldX-i1iVtOCJBSGoL90Ybfjyj_gtt3GX7Mi7Dl5YGYJxQ3xxkYUteQuq6vs7QVZ7kT5TtzXA1hwh_X2Yngaz1YVWuPRWegKdHaESZfCfnG29xAL5ZZ4iPn-iy0pHNbi8jPTfmnZWN7X-4bvnvCrBFSla3ixiQaCM7TBUt6dPm3Cs%3D)
