| | Dear Fellow American,

**I 'm excited to let you know about our free documentary course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."**

Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization."

I know you're not fooled by these disguises.

Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses **because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx.**

It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country.

It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God.

And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities.

The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally _new_ about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact...

**... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. **

That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty.

[**You can do that by registering for "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9869f651bdec4012b22ae243368663cd&_e=Hp4ljM5kazojf9fi5cVoMuOa7gPuEdSmVq6d1Ez0C8NmDWcLz-ycu-1NUnLRAVRG8hIdSpo8YTbTYJJm6tYDi-JEzvWrLfx6s4PsLGyVf3zrUDIbMybLtdGtkEpUqe8aykFPmhfq0K_cvc_TdmCRNINoPHKZ_QV-SOfPMdQF6hhT4zzxd9UAua6aVgpo7KxRp9M8BT7rLHu3CDs4AN9Go1hmfWrGQ1NT1621xAKa7LRlqrqlOm8867jVwgPN5nAldX-i1iVtOCJBSGoL90Ybfukjs-uKS6KbZnxLQ7rdZLSgUVRj-MW1_9TG2rIyyQaaZoli_lPrU3etbp8hRurtW0wCQ2CGWU_LNVgfEc4BTS1yTA9Z4UnKW_cXVLhNOJdCdEny8fF05SETVa7cBVt38taZ465rXiJ4hsCNtJ6w1AA%3D)

Or you can send this to a friend!

This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture.

**Will you join us by registering for this free online course?** You can click on the secure link below to register and get access today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9869f651bdec4012b22ae243368663cd&_e=Hp4ljM5kazojf9fi5cVoMuOa7gPuEdSmVq6d1Ez0C8NmDWcLz-ycu-1NUnLRAVRG8hIdSpo8YTbTYJJm6tYDi-JEzvWrLfx6s4PsLGyVf3zrUDIbMybLtdGtkEpUqe8aykFPmhfq0K_cvc_TdmCRNINoPHKZ_QV-SOfPMdQF6hhT4zzxd9UAua6aVgpo7KxRp9M8BT7rLHu3CDs4AN9Go1hmfWrGQ1NT1621xAKa7LRlqrqlOm8867jVwgPN5nAldX-i1iVtOCJBSGoL90YbfhkhkH6G33VwwuFzRTWCXKxXttXW5ITelEIv-qt93WT_hwAD-OpSqaDoi-jcncj4LW65Nu9fdus5TS-KpTBkzkQMAc9v0KXqaiH6tiL_agH5Ije3p5NfZJmmwMI1g0ZcibuLlhxbc7lK1ydnMP8FUgs%3D)

Most colleges and universities work to indoctrinate young people with Marxism.

That's why taking this course and making it available to as many Americans as possible will be one of the most important ways you will defend liberty in America.

You're one of the reasons why we can defend liberty by producing and promoting courses like "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--so thank you so much for all you do.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. We've released one of our most important free documentary courses this month..."Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"! You can register for this course at the secure link below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9869f651bdec4012b22ae243368663cd&_e=Hp4ljM5kazojf9fi5cVoMuOa7gPuEdSmVq6d1Ez0C8NmDWcLz-ycu-1NUnLRAVRG8hIdSpo8YTbTYJJm6tYDi-JEzvWrLfx6s4PsLGyVf3zrUDIbMybLtdGtkEpUqe8aykFPmhfq0K_cvc_TdmCRNINoPHKZ_QV-SOfPMdQF6hhT4zzxd9UAua6aVgpo7KxRp9M8BT7rLHu3CDs4AN9Go1hmfWrGQ1NT1621xAKa7LRlqrqlOm8867jVwgPN5nAldX-i1iVtOCJBSGoL90YbflFpEsEJM78Z_LCrI7GjAE-GxluKGV_BqmP3F2OYBTo10ZHHR7rRBh-C0H1YmbZHDWUr7AArT93WVzzHwOD1e2GhZ4eTuYFnkQkU63X7NR1PAXQ9dkuV-1N6dH0Tb1LMxMjlon3D0z8jy4Q2mF_83NE%3D)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Pledge Against Woke Curriculum in K-12 Schools
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsVP0M9WMN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osVP0M9WMN

Click
Here to Sign the Pledge Against Woke Curriculum in K-12 Schools

Dear
Fellow Patriot,

I'm
reaching out today to express my deep concern regarding the
introduction of woke curriculum in K-12 schools across our nation
and ask for your help to put a stop to it.

I
strongly believe that the current trend of pushing radical
ideologies like Critical Race Theory (CRT), gender identity
politics, and other divisive teachings is harmful to our
children's education and undermines the fundamental principles
upon which our country was founded.

Will you
take a moment now to sign the pledge to affirm your commitment to
ensure that our children and grandchildren receive a quality
education free from ideological indoctrination?

Do you
want to sit by and allow the infiltration of woke ideology into
classrooms to continue leading to the politicization of education
and the indoctrination of students with divisive and often
inaccurate narratives about our history and society?

I know I
don't because woke curriculum promotes a victimhood mentality and
perpetuates a culture of grievance rather than empowering
students to succeed based on their merits.

Do you
share my concern about the erosion of parental rights and the
imposition of ideological agendas on impressionable young minds?

If you
believe parents should have the primary authority to guide their
children's education and instill values that align with their
beliefs, please sign the pledge below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63819297:sVP0M9WMN:m:3:2532013465:5AD9A4D2CC74E584A2692121B3E845D6:r

Your
signature on the pledge will be used to urge our school boards,
administrators, and policymakers to reject woke curriculum and
instead prioritize academic excellence, objective teaching of
history, and respect for parental rights.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman
American
Cornerstone Institute

Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our
mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious
liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and
developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in
society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's
citizens.

Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute,
All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isVP0M9WMN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osVP0M9WMN

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...

## Winter Storm Threatens Thanksgiving Travel
A late November storm packing snow, high winds, and frigid temperatures is [expected to develop](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPhCAUhH8Ndmzk4SoWFNfQ7bVXGlYe-m4RDHCa_fcXr79mkslkvkzm6zE9LAWKy6fdUFefJmih40JwMUzOUnhPXeO0RwSUDWoxSKE6CaCaVY9-Hr3v3QiyGwZUM7betU_waoT7oFRD-qIJIQYhpJBwk0_bzfcZfdu7HpViXYuOasq370SxrujDOx2Yb3PamqDXWvfC5AcDw8DE955KvSIG5gIzMEJc0jMwP4VHPAsDc1KsmHmpKW-8Jv7MFBfuKZfKT3JY9ozW8TkFx0u0O7fr5ZPndbXxVRY6rsKJ-OI12wMDA9Nk7faTQqDSD6xrl81S-JtZ_7vt0PAbAAD__6tvcDY) out of the Rockies on Tuesday and Wednesday of Thanksgiving week, potentially complicating holiday travel in some areas. The storm will track north and sweep across the North Plains and Upper Mississippi Valley, delivering soaking rains, snow, 50-60 mph wind gusts, and freezing temperatures as far south as the Gulf Coast. The [storm will intensify](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb_G7rA8AzakoHhNurx2SwvDOJ4VNhGgoPz9yttve690jnS-HsvDceTz-d8dZOuWFhxRCQABegmO42dRfbAbEZLsyYKWYJRENP1uPfjJ6RFmuhGO2tPqVgmTdD44nND0bC8aAGgACRIHuTrlJ0_bOIeZjOnUSIFrysN34rPutMVPelMefDr6aPdaX6WT_zq8d3hvrQ0ft6d0vR3eT2rlmvmslEWpKR9izXw-xca5VNE4UHllckGABgMA5jbs9Yh9tuHVOEYus-7U-Dwcx19l_SvB2-JPAAAA__8gTl56) over the Great Lakes Wednesday and Thursday, producing high winds that could knock down tree branches and take out power across the central and North Plains, Great Lakes, and Ohio and Tennessee valleys. Toward week's end, snow is possible across western Michigan and its Upper Peninsula, western New York, parts of the Ohio Valley, the northern mid-Atlantic, and the interior Northeast.
## Tren de Aragua Crime Surges in Tennessee
The Tennessee Bureau of Investigation is warning residents of Nashville, Memphis, Knoxville, and Chattanooga about a surge in Tren de Aragua [gang violence](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2uozAQhZ_GdI7wTwwpXGxDl223RIM9kInMOIJZotynv-L2tzpHOtLRp-_ffbwDFeLlL6wYZa6jba3XxmjTjRmofEbf5DgjWnQNRtM503tnbd88Ymc9hL69tpPvMWUTUgj-FnyAW765eWoonm_GmM4YZ5y9uAl8uiac25AD9r3yLWaSul2elVgeOJdPPXC7pLo2JT5EXrtyf5QdlB1KTVCsYXzv567scNYzQKiyftetZGUHmUgzrLjrFZ5104mEcNfEWpBZE89UZAPBrKePPqgWZNEHMn79xwKsF-Cl2WJ-vakU2kOnfLusQOUHS37TdET7HQAA__94sWyR). The notorious gang has expanded [criminal activity](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAQQL8Gb1h3BzFeGLp4S9eOFoFzTIUhMiSW-_VVund-0nvS-7rOVxdTzPdPt7FtS5kJSEtEiWYOLqZz1l2wCzOx6tiiUThqRTR2q70NEMDgCEYvyht9wSGMwMCkSRlwXbRvGyIaRIWKenVz2l88LzCEgcdRaOAQW9n77xJzW3lJZ3nx3vuydcmurT2qUB-CJkHTcRz96dZS3lTQlPmogiZfsuc9c5C1ucYysQu8V7kU_6zyxZl_npxclqAVKDA49GvbUrfb8DhiSrEORmi4by6mv27778PL0m8AAAD__xXcXzU) beyond human trafficking in those areas, and it's now also committing retail crime theft and murder in broad daylight, taking on drug cartels in what TBI Director David Rausch described as "_very violent, bloody battles_." Tennessee Representative and Chairman of the House Homeland Security Committee Mark Green [released a statement](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGynSAYhJ8Gu98R8CqnoEhjd9OmPIOwKAmCATRz3z5zTn_r3dn95vv1-fw0IYa0_TQHdPP5KQYxEufE56czIX49x85pDwjIDprPkqtRCqG6XU9SefWYPtTDCefgnfVifah54HJep9F3Qb_WOOcz55JL0cvVjPbDwg-Tm6AUGwe40HLpf-eQ2g4fv_KN0tt8dFHvrZ2VyR9MLEwshyl_tgKkfs9XRb_lm4nl9cDEwjkTi91NKIdJ9K5RTtQKEjmQKWa7DJ0FFcmCQqKGlFArQG0H2Zwq_l7vMHtyqK1ctoUblE8kWnNxKJXOHIMNqF3R7vwXYgx1mtk4bIcJ8Y3dvtN4a_E_AAD___sceBU) Friday commending the TBI for sounding the alarm and expressing his support for the incoming Trump-Vance administration's agenda to _" restore order at our borders, revamp interior enforcement, and bring safety back to our communities."_
## Postmortem on Harris Campaign Heats Up
President-elect Donald Trump's decisive win over Vice President Kamala Harris has prompted blunt advice for the Democratic party from within and without. Democratic strategist James Carville blamed Harris' loss on her support of ["exotic" policies](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGP4yAQhX8N7mzBQDApKK5xl2uvtDgY27PCYAGKk3-_irfebjT69PS99-8xPxxFSutft6NtS56Bg-qF6MU4B0fxPasu2AURUHZoxSiFURLAdJvlRpjbwr1ZtL9Jr9Xd-VEj3j1wjhA6sp80IcQohBQSBvnfKX_zuHAdNBrDFMdALZfhK1NqGy7xnZ9YBp_3LtqttaMy-YfBxGA6z3M4Xd0orS0nfLmd0g_KYEp4VgaTd_vhaE2f-yhYKWBq5CKD6SM9an1B5UkxYn91jbnWHl-5ke-PXKlRTrUPuGdf3PV0pb0ZTF2x4TgpRqp6ZIqvu6N4mbbflnta-A4AAP__6cdyLw) and on President Joe Biden not dropping out of the race early enough. NBA great Charles Barkley, an Independent, [blamed the loss](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kMGOpCAUAL8GbxAfILoHDrvb8dZ72mSO5gnPlmkQg3Sb_vvJTOY6P1BVqbfrdMUQw3b7h4lsXfIkW6k5AId-8hjia9KNtwuRJNWQhV7BoJWUQ7Na1c8eDagB0MAMZtDYOYc9qq7ryJkm2E8aAPQACpQUakbtOkdLa7yhYWC6JR9qLuI9h62utMRXflIRLqcm2rXW_WDqN5Mjk-N5nuIrKWGIwmXxuDM5Hnsulclxm5HJEUsNLhIH3f5qOwAmx78rlkgH_4PlHunFL5SyK1gPTpFcDXnjl7xh9Px_eaRdrDXFpli_nyHGcJie6fb2rUxN_WnS08qPAAAA___-cmnP) on a lack of solutions to immigration and inflation, and he criticized Harris' strategy of using celebrities to influence voters. _Real Time_ host Bill Maher [criticized Democrats](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFywyAQRL9G6k4DBxZKQZHGndOm1JzEYREj8EjYxH-fUVKn2mJ3dnbf52W8UIghXT9oZVt8HlGgBilBmtFRiK9Rt856ZmTVspVGyUErxKFd7CQQ0UxvRpxmIbTRyg299GxOmnrS3AZ7tEkpjZRKKuzURHo-zexF73oehkYLdqHkrfvKIZWFfXzlJ2_dnNc22qWU-96o9wbPDZ5rrZ3P34nrfvgNnld2gQ6lhTeYIu1lh8i-gMuP6bgFLtcEdaECHthBWXgFjjyXkBMUujHkxFCZb0D77S_5yg9wwUHdcrq2m3X3GmIMe28aLa4rhfi7r_zH62nxJwAA__8-nG9t) who call Trump supporters "stupid" saying, "_I got bad news for you. They don't have a monopoly on stupid_." At least one Democratic leader could see the writing on the wall before Election Day. Sen. John Fetterman (D-PA) criticized the party's ["woke" positions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D-P4yAUBPBPgzss3oPYvoLiGne59kqLP88xWQwWsLH87VdJv91II41-mv_35W5CDOnxz-yk25oXFKg4AIdx8SbEa1Gd1ysRkuxIwyhhUhJx6jYN0qOw0t4sqNtgAUYrBmsMOeX_wIpd0O81ABgBJEjspTXK3RytYvADTRNTgnxoufTPHFLbaI1XflHpXd67qLfWjsrkX4Yzw_k8zz5Zl-is757hfOQYWnCV4fxhUyTXQk4M52feEl-pNSq7Sbyaq3JPe3bFtMoTkee15YOvhcxXSA9OLypX296xle_94MUlA5PAUXRF--MMMYY6jEyJx25C_BDbb5e9NP4EAAD___PMcF8) during a Nov. 2 appearance on _The Joe Rogan Experience_ and said moving forward, Democrats should stop "freaking out" over every move Trump makes.

clean_body: A late November storm packing snow, high winds, and frigid temperatures is out of the Rockies on Tuesday and Wednesday of Thanksgiving week, potentially complicating holiday travel in some areas. | | | | | | SUNDAY, NOVEMBER 17, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1970, Douglas Engelbart received the patent on his design for a prototype computer mouse. Engelbart called it a "mouse" because he thought the cord looked like a tail. () Did you hang onto some of your ? They might be worth thousands of dollars. Check out Quick Hits to learn more. Today's edition is brought to you by Empower Health Labs. Top Doctors: Use THIS "ear switch miracle" to . | Winter Storm Threatens Thanksgiving Travel A late November storm packing snow, high winds, and frigid temperatures is out of the Rockies on Tuesday and Wednesday of Thanksgiving week, potentially complicating holiday travel in some areas. The storm will track north and sweep across the North Plains and Upper Mississippi Valley, delivering soaking rains, snow, 50-60 mph wind gusts, and freezing temperatures as far south as the Gulf Coast. The over the Great Lakes Wednesday and Thursday, producing high winds that could knock down tree branches and take out power across the central and North Plains, Great Lakes, and Ohio and Tennessee valleys. Toward week's end, snow is possible across western Michigan and its Upper Peninsula, western New York, parts of the Ohio Valley, the northern mid-Atlantic, and the interior Northeast. Tren de Aragua Crime Surges in Tennessee The Tennessee Bureau of Investigation is warning residents of Nashville, Memphis, Knoxville, and Chattanooga about a surge in Tren de Aragua . The notorious gang has expanded beyond human trafficking in those areas, and it's now also committing retail crime theft and murder in broad daylight, taking on drug cartels in what TBI Director David Rausch described as "very violent, bloody battles." Tennessee Representative and Chairman of the House Homeland Security Committee Mark Green Friday commending the TBI for sounding the alarm and expressing his support for the incoming Trump-Vance administration's agenda to " restore order at our borders, revamp interior enforcement, and bring safety back to our communities." Postmortem on Harris Campaign Heats Up President-elect Donald Trump's decisive win over Vice President Kamala Harris has prompted blunt advice for the Democratic party from within and without. Democratic strategist James Carville blamed Harris' loss on her support of and on President Joe Biden not dropping out of the race early enough. NBA great Charles Barkley, an Independent, on a lack of solutions to immigration and inflation, and he criticized Harris' strategy of using celebrities to influence voters. Real Time host Bill Maher who call Trump supporters "stupid" saying, "I got bad news for you. They don't have a monopoly on stupid." At least one Democratic leader could see the writing on the wall before Election Day. Sen. John Fetterman (D-PA) criticized the party's during a Nov. 2 appearance on The Joe Rogan Experience and said moving forward, Democrats should stop "freaking out" over every move Trump makes. clean_body: This is it. | | | | | Friend, I need you to read this before it's too late. Michelle Steel 's race for CA-45 is TOO CLOSE TO CALL , but please don't lose hope. We can't give up in a time like this. Right now is the time to double down and keep our momentum going. So, we have just one question for you today: "Are you still with us?" We need EVERYONE reading this to act before it's too late. Holding the line and saving the House Majority runs through CA-45, and if we stop now, who knows what will happen... We can't give up now. "Friend, can you please rush ANY AMOUNT to stand with Michelle Steel? There’s too much on the line to not act RIGHT NOW." | | "STAND WITH MICHELLE STEEL" We must finish this fight strong, Team Steel | | Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress PO Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743 | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add "info@email.michellesteelca.com" to your address book. Not Sure How? Follow the link below to your email provider to get step by step instructions on how to add us to your address book. , , , , Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: History Facts
subject: "Computers" used to be people
body:
In today’s English lexicon, the word “computer” almost exclusively refers to electronic devices — but it used to be a human job. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68bfm7qps29tz8o0ncf4uwlzj4k4p6dcm18lgc5ydbfia4p2n95u4ol7ypszwso38o4zvemni3q9h5tve14pviypq6j6ipt22axgp9kjunb1hadfv6tzi99vriv3wr9ixtruk8icjljldhvt0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn3gdz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [“Computers” used to be people.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn3gdz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn3gdz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn3gdz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I n today’s English lexicon, the word “computer” almost exclusively refers to electronic devices — but it used to be a human job. For centuries, “computer” meant “one who computes,” particularly in an astronomical observatory or as a surveyor. This definition dates all the way back to the [early 1600s](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn3gdz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), long before even the most primitive digital computing machines existed.
---
The role of computers was, more often than not, filled by women. Although the work required a great deal of skill and made major contributions to the field of astronomy, computing was considered clerical work. In the 1870s, the Harvard College Observatory hired several dozen women as computers, who compared photographic plates of the night sky and painstakingly measured the differences in stars’ positions. Among them were Williamina Fleming, who pioneered classifying stars by temperature; Annie Jump Cannon, who created the letter stellar classification system that scientists still use today; and Henrietta Swan Leavitt, who discovered around half of all variable stars (meaning their brightness changes when viewed from Earth) known at the time.
Perhaps the best-known human computers were those [employed by NASA ](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn3gdz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)to make calculations by hand during critical space missions. [Katherine Johnson](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn3gdz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), one of the three African American NASA computers featured in the book and film _Hidden Figures_(along with Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson), performed calculations for the Mercury and Apollo missions, including the first moon landing.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn3gdz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn3gdz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The first mechanical computer was designed in the 19th century.
In 1833, British inventor Charles Babbage had a groundbreaking idea. Having just worked on a giant calculating machine, he realized that machines could be more than just basic calculators; they could also be programmed using algorithms to solve far more complex calculations automatically. Babbage planned for his Analytical Engine, as the programmable computer was known, to run on steam, receive data via punched cards, and output results through an automatic printer. Mathematician Ada Lovelace wrote the [first computer program](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn3gdz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) while studying it — although, since the machine was never completed, she never got to actually try it out. The Analytical Engine was left unfinished upon Babbage’s death in 1871. The concept was wildly ambitious, and technology didn’t actually catch up until the 1940s with the completion of the first electronic programmable computer, the ENIAC.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: An update for you on states where abortion rights were on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Warren for Senate: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/370?source=em-header&t=1001&akid=2416%2E4032634%2ECU0EWb

In the past week, most of the national conversation has
been about the presidential election results — with good reason. And I’m
working to hold the line for our values and our freedoms against the
incoming Trump-Vance administration.

But looking further down the ballot, I also want to shine a light on key
state-level results in our fight for reproductive freedom. Last month, I
asked this team to support six coalitions fighting for abortion rights
with ballot measures in six states. Here’s what happened in those races:

Overturned State Abortion Bans

In Missouri, a group called Missourians for Constitutional Freedom fought
to put a constitutional amendment on the ballot to overturn the state’s
total abortion ban — a ban with no exceptions even for rape and incest.
Voters passed the ballot measure and will ensure that families can make
their own decisions. While we’re at it, Missouri voters also passed higher
minimum wage and paid sick leave laws.

And in Arizona, Arizona for Abortion Access passed an amendment to repeal
the state’s ban and protect Arizonans’ reproductive freedoms, putting
decisions about pregnancy and abortion in the hands of patients and
healthcare providers — exactly where they belong.

Passed Proactive Constitutional Protections for Reproductive Freedom

Nevada voters took the first step toward enshrining abortion rights in
their state constitution by passing a ballot measure led by Nevadans for
Reproductive Freedom. This is a critical effort against anti-abortion
legislators in the state, and it will be on the ballot again in 2026 to
make it official.

In New York, New Yorkers for Equal Rights cemented the fundamental right
to reproductive freedoms in the state constitution so they are permanently
protected without political interference. The ballot measure — prop 1 —
also prohibits any government discrimination regardless of gender, age,
ethnicity, pregnancy status, disability status, or sexual orientation.

Fell Just Short

Floridians Protecting Freedom fought to put an initiative on the ballot to
end Florida's extreme abortion ban, give women and doctors the freedom to
make health care decisions, and maintain existing parental rights
protections in Florida’s constitution. They demonstrated the will of the
people by winning a clear majority — over 57% — but Florida requires a 60%
threshold for constitutional amendments. This was a heartbreaking result.

In Nebraska, another state with a total abortion ban, the Protect Our
Rights campaign had a ballot measure to end the current abortion ban and
give patients, families, and doctors the care they need without
restrictions. It fell short by just a few percentage points. Another
frustratingly close-but-not-enough result.

I’m grateful for everyone who threw themselves into these fights. The
victories will be life-changing. And even in defeat, the hard work
mattered — new groups have gotten together, new partners have fought side
by side, and they’ve strengthened their muscles for all the fights to
come.

Everyone who stood in front of supermarkets to collect petition
signatures, everyone who knocked on doors in the summer heat, everyone who
made phone call after phone call to voter after voter, everyone who
pitched in any amount of time or money they could — it made a difference.
I’m deeply grateful. The work will echo in new freedoms won and new
coalitions set up to achieve victories down the line.

You know, in 2022, when the far right finally achieved their goal of
overturning Roe, it was the culmination of decades of work — in state
houses, in state-level elections, in winning all the races that let them
stack the Supreme Court with right-wing extremists.

When Roe became law, and the far right saw women gaining more freedom,
they took it as a defeat, and they got to work. Now that a constitutional
protection has been ripped away from over half our population, it’s an
infuriating loss that we must work even harder to undo.

Ever since extremists on the Supreme Court overturned Roe, this team has
used our anger and our determination to fight back — together we’ve raised
over $700,000 to support abortion organizations that connect patients
directly to the care they need, help elect pro-choice candidates, and pass
ballot initiatives protecting the right to an abortion.

And we’re not stopping.

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2845?amount=28&t=1006&akid=2416%2E4032634%2ECU0EWb ]As we face down right-wing extremists who will keep pushing their
radical anti-reproductive freedom agenda, can you chip in
$28 or any
amount to support the National Network of Abortion Funds? 100% of your
contribution will go to this vital organization. And if we can make a
difference for just one patient, that’s enough reason to stay in the
fight.

In the Senate, I will do everything I can to block Congressional
Republicans and the Trump-Vance administration from further restricting
access to abortion and attacking access to contraception and treatments
like IVF.

I will keep working to elect champions of reproductive freedom so that
when Democrats once again control the Senate, House, and White House, we
can pass a law codifying the right to an abortion.

I will keep pushing for judicial reforms like rebalancing the Supreme
Court by expanding it — so a handful of radicals can’t keep trampling over
our basic rights.

I will keep fighting to pass abortion rights protections at the state
level [ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2845?t=1007&akid=2416%2E4032634%2ECU0EWb ]while supporting organizations that connect abortion patients to
the care they need.

And I know I’m not alone. We make each other stronger in this fight and
all the fights to come.
And we must continue to look after each other.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2aee3d17304041feb6e27b97a415c57c&_e=Cqaq3Uki7mTFxGrPWOiX7AuORrFC6A1vKoA7BYXfGIxGvMcck1fJVmAPsqtYy1M43Iz5AB03Px4gsxT7yKGNtJ2eGYaJiYNrZM61xsMS-PAN-LWhjSfhbe0W-UlLPFQdeCaslXuaVldZ86SO4wSd0L5K2cbGcC2rujXSo46dfn5CGZS4-OxJovfOFro8aJlvjigYmBeubt--03v7Qbal_qu_cO24cryNTgsz1AQP6Z3uHapyRalJMMvv5qJ69yY5a7EgkscurTZRfH73TyHByLc_8uIm-JMR-hqbeSJ33MK9Naa1RFJW6EywPr2MVPnpYuaPN2_pS780AbZBEyARtd_rmcIe9Knf9hoPhjdBtSykBGITKp6ScZnFfbwN7QByGb-EJtXm1ngQrnQYY3rIGQ%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2aee3d17304041feb6e27b97a415c57c&_e=Cqaq3Uki7mTFxGrPWOiX7AuORrFC6A1vKoA7BYXfGIxGvMcck1fJVmAPsqtYy1M43Iz5AB03Px4gsxT7yKGNtJ2eGYaJiYNrZM61xsMS-PAN-LWhjSfhbe0W-UlLPFQdeCaslXuaVldZ86SO4wSd0L5K2cbGcC2rujXSo46dfn5CGZS4-OxJovfOFro8aJlvjigYmBeubt--03v7Qbal_qu_cO24cryNTgsz1AQP6Z3N2_pbuiM9eDZF2dCKIl9K-LqkjyBo84vcXgZe9KKJKUX-j63zSuxBLQfk4fMTRAMg9h5SPk1wFDk5mtXFqsStTywSFFUqceQ7fKUE_Zl8mwKCOX79YrWe7TS0_cQ8qxRImEJxHef7hPuFpELBZTmjF9HdWu61ChlKFN7Ka68waw%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2aee3d17304041feb6e27b97a415c57c&_e=Cqaq3Uki7mTFxGrPWOiX7AuORrFC6A1vKoA7BYXfGIxGvMcck1fJVmAPsqtYy1M43Iz5AB03Px4gsxT7yKGNtJ2eGYaJiYNrZM61xsMS-PAN-LWhjSfhbe0W-UlLPFQdeCaslXuaVldZ86SO4wSd0L5K2cbGcC2rujXSo46dfn5CGZS4-OxJovfOFro8aJlvjigYmBeubt--03v7Qbal_qu_cO24cryNTgsz1AQP6Z3dqpbDXCAvlzAB6LDljSd9AwrTK1M4S7W8H8tweoLWIEXHcEsaCXWPCc6HE2jHaBBxhttos2Tqs1gDFMbDS-xD3Nh5NiK-uODGYCUsGaUe7JE8Rg32Mqk-99-p4dQCqBBqWT66TGo6yCg0p0mOMsPOGmZCQ7wkP_sduB7-x30J4Q%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2aee3d17304041feb6e27b97a415c57c&_e=Cqaq3Uki7mTFxGrPWOiX7AuORrFC6A1vKoA7BYXfGIxGvMcck1fJVmAPsqtYy1M43Iz5AB03Px4gsxT7yKGNtJ2eGYaJiYNrZM61xsMS-PAN-LWhjSfhbe0W-UlLPFQdeCaslXuaVldZ86SO4wSd0L5K2cbGcC2rujXSo46dfn5CGZS4-OxJovfOFro8aJlvjigYmBeubt--03v7Qbal_qu_cO24cryNTgsz1AQP6Z0NfdHaqVFliSRottGACGXEkwxPENuzsiMT5-pXomE6-OTLwdxlnn45er8neuxaonR4CTGA7KHDd24j6eXB_E1kTfm9PrVzAjK_6ttModhtnF-ByrVqMJZlTBd0mhxhCCpRueyxN46z5DF8B-F7mr4JL5ar16-QG77CUhHuEQ4FXg%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2aee3d17304041feb6e27b97a415c57c&_e=Cqaq3Uki7mTFxGrPWOiX7AuORrFC6A1vKoA7BYXfGIxGvMcck1fJVmAPsqtYy1M43Iz5AB03Px4gsxT7yKGNtJ2eGYaJiYNrZM61xsMS-PAN-LWhjSfhbe0W-UlLPFQdeCaslXuaVldZ86SO4wSd0L5K2cbGcC2rujXSo46dfn5CGZS4-OxJovfOFro8aJlvjigYmBeubt--03v7Qbal_qu_cO24cryNTgsz1AQP6Z03WeQsoHy1r6LZ7snIXwKJ07UEmYPNPm7UMVH6Bcu3MNdRYJ0oQbmDxQpjXwD3VFfBnOLYeAF9JGJYJuhaEItLQuqqk96SgqN9iqHgPqJFl06LRHozBXH44ELopPyGu5sOkWwDxwaYNFoYFp00ivxqukzwxVW5Bv6X4svpIUjDQg%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2aee3d17304041feb6e27b97a415c57c&_e=Cqaq3Uki7mTFxGrPWOiX7AuORrFC6A1vKoA7BYXfGIxGvMcck1fJVmAPsqtYy1M43Iz5AB03Px4gsxT7yKGNtJ2eGYaJiYNrZM61xsMS-PAN-LWhjSfhbe0W-UlLPFQdeCaslXuaVldZ86SO4wSd0L5K2cbGcC2rujXSo46dfn5CGZS4-OxJovfOFro8aJlvjigYmBeubt--03v7Qbal_qu_cO24cryNTgsz1AQP6Z1oi3EvN6FejHYJP7FY60qI6NEFVrRf0cwGjcEYQ2brtlpMpIL0hIxDOYlbw7m9aOFSBEEH6LboIqB2LNWEvHUmPRZpdECzMoD4wZ4ppuszQF-ttNLZmlYPpvoAp6TllhbgHDWa_G6N3kATYZum5uQxq2rYEdO5sW_NOJf9qQK9yA%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2aee3d17304041feb6e27b97a415c57c&_e=Cqaq3Uki7mTFxGrPWOiX7FgWdQpM8O7pPvM2-4qp0HS4n3J3RM9qDsI4t7x4Wkz1OEdWY3UErtY6gHswSAs_Lac7IP2Nfq6IxqHVP_dAqF7PryBvohpaD6DoQnk98YQ1uc0kXtqeGhz0H_9LA5xNZwLQV4d17pMna3RlwpHoE51kHIX9Ww2x783U2wdVF4cz6g_9pgts2RX0RywxVi95dw%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click here to [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=2aee3d17304041feb6e27b97a415c57c&_t=xjLu1t6b3w0ABDiflXBlr4qcaPCmFw_bAm_7r1BxUaU0uHCNqCunAfN_M6h2xwWvfkvdsLVqfRz0zibMRHQY5rNCzCS9n0MxmeXzAmKOj99AaWoA_w628Ni-phILEGEm)

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death. The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder. Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison. Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. Gratefully, Patti Reilly P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Click here to

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: PA democracy dies in broad daylight
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=86249935f6&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Democracy dies in daylight as Democrats break the law to help Casey](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=95466642c8&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Kyle Sammin_
_The Washington Post_ has been telling us for eight years now that _Democracy Dies in Darkness_. Anyone who watched the proceedings in Bucks County this week knows that’s not true. It dies in broad daylight.

As we all know by now, Republican Dave McCormick came out on top in the Senate race against three-term incumbent Democrat Bob Casey, Jr. As the final votes were being counted, the race tightened, but McCormick still led by tens of thousands of votes statewide, with not nearly enough provisional and absentee ballots still outstanding for Casey to honestly believe he had a chance to pull ahead in the tally.

But even if he couldn’t honestly believe it, he and Democratic elections lawyer Marc Elias sure seem to _dishonestly_ believe it. Casey made a big deal about counting every vote, even after the Associated Press and others acknowledged that he had lost. And that’s not a crazy thing to insist on — in fact, under state law, these ballots were always going to be counted. At no point were county officials going to stop doing their duty to tally every valid ballot.

At the same time, though, we were given to understand that the officials across the commonwealth’s 67 counties would all follow the law as they did so.

**Why It Matters**. But what did the Casey campaign do? Ask counties to count undated ballots. Where did they do it? Not everywhere, just in the counties where they thought they would find more votes for their man. Exactly the situation the high court wanted to avoid and, in fact, ruled that counties _must_ avoid.

In some ways, you can’t blame McCormick then or Casey now for asking. The legal system is adversarial and lawyers must zealously represent their clients’ interests. It should have been an impossible argument to win, since the state Supreme Court said no to this idea _just_ two weeks ago, but they’re allowed to try, and allowed to lose.

What you shouldn’t expect is for the county commissioners to agree to something that they know is illegal. And yet! Here we are. Commissioners of Bucks, Centre, Montgomery, and Philadelphia Counties — all Democrats — voted to accept those illegal ballots, acting in open defiance of the clear and unambiguous ruling of the court.

They should all lose their jobs.

It’s not going to work. Even if they cheat, the votes are not there for Casey to prevail. But scraping the bottom of the barrel for invalid votes does get the race close enough to allow a recount. Which will also fail.

These commissioners think they’re doing something noble and brave, standing up for something. But they forget which side of the table they’re on. When a citizen refuses to obey an unjust law, it is called civil disobedience. When the government breaks the law, it is tyranny.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=62fb905340&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[I don’t know if I belong to a political party anymore. So I’m throwing a party instead.](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a8e3d28a1a&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Heather Shayne Blakeslee_
“We don’t care who you voted for, just bring a dish to the potluck.”

I’ve uttered that phrase hundreds of times to my neighbors in South Philadelphia the last three weeks as I passed out postcards to invite them to a Unity Picnic and concert at Old Swedes’ Episcopal Church in Queen Village this weekend.

I could see people’s shoulders relax, their brows unfurrow. Often, they looked at me with some mix of gratitude and confusion.

Sometimes the reaction was disbelief. One guy at the Sunday Headhouse Farmers Market, dressed in his Eagles gear and pushing a stroller, happily took a card but then as he walked away sheepishly admitted to me, “I voted for Trump.” And I told him again — I don’t care who you voted for, just bring a dish to the potluck.

**Why It Matters**. Six years ago, I started a Philadelphia-based art and ideas magazine called _Root Quarterly_ , in part because I almost lost my relationship with my conservative father, whom I love dearly, over politics.

I wanted to create a place that got people off the hamster wheel of online insanity — our credo is print is dead, long live print. Our amazing collaborators want to employ art and beauty as a way to bridge divides, and for Philadelphia and Pennsylvania to contribute to national conversations — about housing, education, and culture. We’re probably the only arts and culture magazine in the country that was explicitly founded with viewpoint diversity and pluralism — not pro forma DEI — in mind. If we’re going to rebuild the fourth estate, we believe we need to do it with regenerative media that is rooted to its region, that is centered in elevation and celebration, and that aspires to intellectual and artistic excellence—and also to intellectual humility and curiosity.

Imagine that you are looking back on our country in 2,000 years. Its first 500 years will all be considered Early American History. That means that we are all founders, figuring it out together.

We need better political parties, yes... and, maybe we also just need better _parties_?

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=86854014b1&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: CHOP’s key board members refuse to answer questions about sex reassignment surgeries](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4098262cce&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Where Trump did and didn’t gain votes in Philadelphia](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=38ec65c618&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: A day at the polls](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fc59a9b2f8&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Vince Fenerty: Republican gains in Philadelphia helped carry the party to statewide victories](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9b3f0cfa8c&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Andy Bloom: Kamala didn’t close – and here’s why](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=36ce977353&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: So much for the Dobbs backlash](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9aaaedfd37&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. Fact-Check PA Launch**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a8062eab95&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| Fact-checkers often play umpire but rarely call it fair. One side’s truths are labeled “needs more context,” while the other’s whoppers get a pass. That’s why we launched [Fact-Check PA](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=88eed109f5&e=b7b3eddce2): to sort fact from fiction, no matter the source. Visit us for breakdowns of claims from Pennsylvania politicians, interest groups, and media—and [send us tips](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=99703c4d6b&e=b7b3eddce2) on what to check.

Fact-Check PA, brought to you by _Voices of Reason,_ officially launches this week. [Visit our site](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=de9df33112&e=b7b3eddce2) today for a preview of what's to come!
---
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
"People violate laws anytime they want” is a jarring statement from anyone, but it truly shocks the conscience when you hear it from an elected official charged with enforcement of the laws. But that’s what Bucks County Commissioner Diane Ellis-Marseglia (D) boldly stated with regard to invalid counting ballots that the Pennsylvania Supreme Court decreed (twice!) should not be counted. Breccan F. Thies of _The Federalist_ has [the rundown of this scandalous abuse of power](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=27410e6f88&e=b7b3eddce2) and Senator Bob Casey’s desperate effort to hang on to his seat, by hook or by crook.****

USO Supporter,
As Americans across the country prepare to celebrate Thanksgiving with loved ones, the USO is working hard to ensure that our service members spending the holiday far from home don't go without a warm meal.
This year, we're hoping military supporters like you can join us in these special holiday preparations: [**Will you share your favorite holiday dishes to help us get inspiration for our USO Center menus?**](https://links.e.uso.)
[VOTE NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Providing thousands of service members deployed all across the world with a warm, festive meal is no easy task. But if it weren't for the USO, some of our heroes in uniform would spend Thanksgiving eating the same old food, barely even realizing that it's a holiday.
Our service members deserve better than MREs or mess hall food on a day like Thanksgiving, and it's often up to the USO to provide it for them. That begins with preparing the most delicious meal possible. [**Will you vote for your Thanksgiving favorites now to help inspire what we serve our military heroes this year?**](https://links.e.uso.)
Thank you for joining in our Thanksgiving preparations.
--Team USO

subject: We’re not in the clear yet, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Election Day may be in the books, but my race isn’t done yet.
Sorry to reach out like this...

| |
---
| | | Friend, Election Day may be in the books, _but my race isn 't done yet._

_**[I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3a0c41510cc7436c986898117b185762&_e=NI31nvM32LImEkP5G_mgP1Sigj4AugjzvbNkpnXv48ltSZ88imRPr6GDw3ZkbDYfWa-nbFU0z4edw4HVPQYcGpy-HnhokoLhLhjdT9zJsAxERQCYI1QU3eVtNFQyG9BkGsdyXBI0NLq_lzYqn2n5jcnvLac8paurIldV2UgVi0aqh62Gqn2LsAet1ELduZm0ekjzcKvXLW39rdcQ_0hjqlel12dKIJFrxBPSALRXwbmKde8foyaq3bKcAo9uGMQdQs7uwc1-ZrOu4AHkyGVPdljh_eQrLdXQzqUWGp4ZLDtoydRMXQzi_876ohvuldI1pMXm3Ath6c6ZYdpG5Rtua5A3bLV-5w-2JIZM0uAPOQPGNc3whQH8RUGHR5Cre02A_mLHLnqMGBlr3VvlaQ8KjCXX9DJoPrZL2RJ__1s9gfk%3D "I’m neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.")**_

If we're going to pull this out and keep my seat and our House Majority RED, then I'm going to need all hands on deck.

I spent every dime I had just to get through Election Day, and now I'm running on fumes. I NEED your urgent support to help me keep this fight going before the ballots are all counted.

_**[Please, can I count on you, Friend?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3a0c41510cc7436c986898117b185762&_e=NI31nvM32LImEkP5G_mgP1Sigj4AugjzvbNkpnXv48ltSZ88imRPr6GDw3ZkbDYfWa-nbFU0z4edw4HVPQYcGpy-HnhokoLhLhjdT9zJsAxERQCYI1QU3eVtNFQyG9BkGsdyXBI0NLq_lzYqn2n5jcnvLac8paurIldV2UgVi0aqh62Gqn2LsAet1ELduZm0ekjzcKvXLW39rdcQ_0hjqlel12dKIJFrxBPSALRXwbmKde8foyaq3bKcAo9uGMQdQs7uwc1-ZrOu4AHkyGVPdlFy72SYfDGohq26fTcqcwhl_Y6KkCIllZ4AEz0jn4OQ9RFv42k3gF5diotThcQ4Mf1vUNy6H3UPea-cVDl5wFLcwA4YDRCWIKzOF8WxbWJBeoJnej-TKF64qNhGUtlyyHojb8BtCgzsnlJOtcdm7fI%3D "Please, can I count on you, Friend?")**_

Michelle Steel

name: Bob Casey
subject: Let’s finish strong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
body:
I’m counting on you.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4854%2E552475%2EePN0Gz)
Peter,
We’ve done such incredible work together. Today, I’m asking you to keep working with us.
I’ve always stood up for the people of our Commonwealth — and I believe every person’s voice should be heard.
That’s why we have to see this across the finish line.
[**I’ll never stop fighting for Pennsylvania, but I need you with me to help us keep going:****Will you help us fight to ensure that every Pennsylvanians' voice is heard by donating $****5****or more right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241114-2?refcode=em20241117-1&refcode2=4854_552475_ePN0Gz&akid=4854%2E552475%2EePN0Gz)
[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241114-2?amount=15&refcode=em20241117-1-el&refcode2=4854_552475_ePN0Gz&akid=4854%2E552475%2EePN0Gz) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241114-2?amount=25&refcode=em20241117-1-el&refcode2=4854_552475_ePN0Gz&akid=4854%2E552475%2EePN0Gz) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241114-2?amount=50&refcode=em20241117-1-el&refcode2=4854_552475_ePN0Gz&akid=4854%2E552475%2EePN0Gz) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241114-2?amount=100&refcode=em20241117-1-el&refcode2=4854_552475_ePN0Gz&akid=4854%2E552475%2EePN0Gz) [Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241114-2?amount=250&refcode=em20241117-1-el&refcode2=4854_552475_ePN0Gz&akid=4854%2E552475%2EePN0Gz) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241114-2?refcode=em20241117-1&refcode2=4854_552475_ePN0Gz&akid=4854%2E552475%2EePN0Gz)
---
Democracy means ensuring everyone's voices are heard and that they matter. Pennsylvania is the birthplace of democracy, and I’m not giving up that fight. I hope you’re not ready to give up either.
**Let’s finish this strong:**[**Invest $****5****or more in the fight to ensure every PA voter's voice is heard.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241114-2?refcode=em20241117-1&refcode2=4854_552475_ePN0Gz&akid=4854%2E552475%2EePN0Gz)

Bob Casey

| | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=1d3520e28e034ccab90e9ac4a6e155b5&_e=pPQ3DuNJmlIIjIcwGxMdByXgYZ2Kb08BRUYAGI09D6-pQhBIu3oUMGkDAIT41_FTJX3c893LHAZ15XR7_O3qFyZFtWZpLAjxKyoHQCiWAETNxV2hW7r2Ey8Ehx5Pxc3GOwkOeqlAt13h_bfHCN1qYXwPloVBQ2BI2IKR3w2fQo0tJwz8FnGUf3gjdC07YPsYW4J-hnciBliKOwTBQwIOX2ka7N7MSg7aveRdm_ZFiJioNNUkSLApKBJhAapvPvE63hCWNLpFLy2dPRo6hmog1lXMeQcvPW7sJEQmH9FI44Kfe1vwvlIXyijPP-4-K1btBqE2srNhgBYXpQLwRmK3C5qbLRWY3kyeMj9gYPQM60rohs1fJOory0dDzhXQC49r9e4VmXdZQOucmXKVLvZlpg%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter,

When it comes to electing and supporting the true conservative champions in Congress, the **House Freedom Fund (HFF) and House Freedom Action (HFA)** are the best groups for getting the job done.

Unlike other groups, HFF and HFA are the _**ONLY organizations dedicated to defending and expanding the House Freedom Caucus**_**** and they are to one mission: electing fighters who will defend conservative principles, fight for our liberties, and hold the Washington establishment accountable. As the only group dedicated to supporting the most principled leaders in Congress, HFF, and HFA go above and beyond in each election cycle to ensure that the strongest conservatives can compete in races nationwide. Here’s what makes HFF unique: **1\. Focused Support for Freedom Caucus Candidates** HFF and HFA aren’t just about talk—we put action behind our words. While many groups may claim to support conservative ideals, HFF is laser-focused on advancing **House Freedom Caucus members and potential new members.**

This cycle, Former House Freedom Caucus Chairman Scott Perry faced a **MASSIVE $10 MILLION** in leftist attack ads against him. It was HFF and HFA that stepped up with $2 million to support his re-election when other groups left him for dead. HFF and HFA NEVER back down from our candidates and we’re proud of our efforts to re-elect Scott Perry! **2\. The Only Official PACs for the House Freedom Caucus** No other PACs can claim to be the official fundraising arm of the House Freedom Caucus. That’s why your support for HFF and HFA directly fuels the candidates who are bringing real change to Congress, challenging the status quo, and standing up to entrenched powers in Washington. **3\. Backed by Grassroots Supporters Like You** HFF and HFA are fueled by a powerful grassroots movement that understands what’s at stake. **We rely on support from dedicated conservatives like you,** not large corporate donors who may expect a seat at the table. That’s how we ensure our candidates are beholden only to the people they represent. **4\. Proven Success in Tough Races** HFF and HFA take on some of the toughest battles in the country. We help fund and support races that are often overlooked by larger organizations, providing essential resources to candidates who face overwhelming odds. And time after time, with your help, we’ve seen these underdogs emerge victorious and bring fresh, principled voices to Congress. Scott Perry’s race is a perfect example of HFF and HFA stepping up when nobody else will. **5\. Empowering New Conservative Leaders** Our work goes beyond supporting current members. HFF actively recruits and trains new candidates who are ready to carry the torch of conservatism forward. From coast to coast, we identify and empower leaders who share our values, helping them take on even the most entrenched incumbents. FOUR new members will be added to the ranks of the House Freedom Caucus with the possibility of more as races are called.

**With President Trump’s HISTORIC victory and our successes this year, we want to thank our generous supporters tremendously for your support.**

**_We could not do it without your help._**

But there is so much more work to be done.

**_[**_House Freedom Fund would be honored if you could continue funding our efforts to make the Freedom Caucus the most powerful caucus in Congress._ **](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=1d3520e28e034ccab90e9ac4a6e155b5&_e=pPQ3DuNJmlIIjIcwGxMdByXgYZ2Kb08BRUYAGI09D6-pQhBIu3oUMGkDAIT41_FTJX3c893LHAZ15XR7_O3qFyZFtWZpLAjxKyoHQCiWAETNxV2hW7r2Ey8Ehx5Pxc3GOwkOeqlAt13h_bfHCN1qYXwPloVBQ2BI2IKR3w2fQo0tJwz8FnGUf3gjdC07YPsYW4J-hnciBliKOwTBQwIOX2ka7N7MSg7aveRdm_ZFiJioNNUkSLApKBJhAapvPvE6EnlcfejTyyI6IOFxdzPwday3kEdbA0haJstEKxPdotxf4PZCTRmatvdejnDxa8vlnWLtGOBrB2_PvM-WMJX-yjkY7xduQf8jSjbyYM4f4p6VGCicAhTy-1TdC3thm30qrVTpdvnApl7LfoDJLSBsdg%3D%3D)_ **
---

Millions of Americans feel like no matter how many stretches, supplements, or pills they take... their achy joints just never seem to get better.
Most doctors blame old injuries, poor genetics, and more often than not — just "getting older."
However, breakthrough Harvard research recently discovered something shocking:

name: United College Park
subject: What to Watch at the Nov. 18 Council Meeting 👀
body:
| |
---
Highlights from the agenda and why your participation matters—together, we can hold College Park accountable. | | [View in browser](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4MjYwNjQ3OTE1ODE2ODAzLFwiclwiOjEzODI2MDY2NjYxNzE2OTc2MX0iLCJzIjoiODQ3MGFkNjk1NzRhODI2OSJ9)
| | |
---
|
---
**[](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4MjYwNjQ3OTIzMTU2ODQ1LFwiclwiOjEzODI2MDY2NjYxNzE2OTc2MX0iLCJzIjoiODQ1YTUwZmMwNGI2NjgyOSJ9)Dear Peter,**
At United College Park, we believe in equipping our community with the knowledge needed to actively participate in local governance. Based on the Council Package, we’ve prepared this commentary to highlight key items on the upcoming agenda. For deeper insights, visit former Councilman Clay’s site at [www.clayoncouncil.com](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4MjYwNjQ3OTMwNDk2ODkwLFwiclwiOjEzODI2MDY2NjYxNzE2OTc2MX0iLCJzIjoiMWI1NWY2ZTdlMmJiZTVhMyJ9).
While original documents are available on the city’s website, they can be tricky to locate. Navigate to **City of College Park > Government > Agendas and Minutes > [Council Packets](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4MjYwNjQ3OTM3ODM2OTMyLFwiclwiOjEzODI2MDY2NjYxNzE2OTc2MX0iLCJzIjoiM2QxMmE3YjQ4OTM2MzlhZCJ9)** and select the date you need. Transparency is claimed as a core value of our city—let’s hold them to it.
|
---
**Workshop**
|
---
**[](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4MjYwNjQ3OTQ0MTI4NDAwLFwiclwiOjEzODI2MDY2NjYxNzE2OTc2MX0iLCJzIjoiYmFkMmMzOTM5N2U2ZTg5YiJ9)** The workshop begins 90 minutes before the main meeting and often sets the stage for critical decisions. This Monday, the council will discuss scheduled Recreation events for the year and hear an informational presentation on energy savings.
**Pro Tip:** Always watch for last-minute agenda additions. These can introduce significant, unadvertised items under the guise of urgency. Let’s ensure transparency is more than just a buzzword.

|
---
********Meeting Highlights****

|
---
**Item 5: Proclamation** The council plans to honor Winston Denmark, the contract City Attorney, whose firm has billed the city substantial sums for legal advice, BIDA representation, and defending multiple lawsuits against the city. This includes a suit filed by a council member against the Deputy City Clerk. While Mr. Denmark’s contributions are clearly valued, it will be interesting to see how this proclamation is received by the public—and if the Mayor chooses to read it aloud.
| | |
---
|
---
**Item 6: Remarks of Citizens** This is your chance to speak directly to the council about issues that matter to you. Whether it’s raising a concern, sharing feedback, or offering praise, every voice adds strength to our community. When more people speak up, it sends a clear message: we are watching, we care, and we demand accountability.
Public remarks remain one of the few avenues for real-time citizen engagement, and they have power in numbers. Even if you’re unsure what to say, showing up and standing with your neighbors makes an impact. United College Park can help with talking points if needed.
Check the first page of the agenda for guidelines on how to participate. Together, we can make a difference.
| | |
---
|
---
**Item 7: Public Hearing—Conditional Use Permit for Vape Shop** A hearing will be held for a Conditional Use Permit for a vape shop on Old National Highway, sponsored by Councilmember Carn. Zoning laws, written before vape shops existed, require this special permit. Public input is crucial here—this is your chance to speak, without a time limit, to share your thoughts. Attendance is required to participate.
| | |
---
|
---
**Item 8: Consent Agenda** The Consent Agenda is designed for routine, non-controversial items, grouped together to save time. Monday’s items appear straightforward, but past meetings have shown that controversial issues are sometimes hidden here. Vigilance is key—let’s hold the council accountable.
| | |
---
|
---
**Item 9B: Park Restrooms and Attendants** A step in the right direction: the restrooms in all three city parks will remain open through winter, reversing an earlier decision to close them. However, the implementation raises questions: • Why hire **eight attendants** for $70,000 when technology and simpler solutions could suffice? • Why is the HR Director presenting this proposal? • Why are restroom features like remote access and automated controls not being utilized?
The effort is appreciated, but we must continue to ask thoughtful questions about the use of resources.
|
---
| | Join the conversation on Speak Up College Park! | | | | [ Speak Up! ](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4MjYwNjQ3OTUxNDY4NDQyLFwiclwiOjEzODI2MDY2NjYxNzE2OTc2MX0iLCJzIjoiOTFhMjJiZTI5Y2FmYTEzYSJ9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**Item 9C: New Ordinances** A 21-page ordinance overhaul, sponsored by Councilmember Carn, is up for discussion. Unfortunately, it lacks critical details, including: • A staff report explaining why these updates are needed. • Input from departments like Code Enforcement, Police, or Fire. • A comparison of the current and proposed ordinances.
Given the potential for significant impact on property owners and businesses, this item should be tabled for a workshop to ensure thorough review and transparency.
| | |
---
|
---
**Item 9D: Education and Community Outreach Coordinator** A new, one-year contracted position is proposed with a four-page description heavy on buzzwords but light on specifics. Key questions: • What is the actual budget for this position? • Why is the city pursuing a youth education role, typically handled by Fulton County?
The concept may hold promise, but clarity and accountability are essential before moving forward.
|
---
**Final Thoughts**
|
---
Don’t miss the reports from the City Attorney, City Manager, and Mayor & Council. These segments often provide valuable insight into the city’s priorities and operations—sometimes entertaining, sometimes eye-opening.
Thank you for staying informed and engaged. Together, we can shape a more transparent and accountable College Park.
_Submitted by your United College Park volunteers_
|
---
| | **Visit UnitedCollegePark.com to learn more** | | | | [ Click Here ](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4MjYwNjQ3OTU3NzU5OTA5LFwiclwiOjEzODI2MDY2NjYxNzE2OTc2MX0iLCJzIjoiNmI1MzcyMWExMjdjODcxYiJ9)
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4MjYwNjQ3OTY3MTk3MTA4LFwiclwiOjEzODI2MDY2NjYxNzE2OTc2MX0iLCJzIjoiNDQwYTBlZDE2Mzc4Y2Y4MSJ9) | [ ](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4MjYwNjQ3OTc1NTg1NzMxLFwiclwiOjEzODI2MDY2NjYxNzE2OTc2MX0iLCJzIjoiNDQwZDQ3ZTAzMzYzNjJiNyJ9)
---|---

3799 Main Street Box 87398 College Park, GA 30337
United States of America

This guy even said that “germs are not a real thing” and that he “hasn’t washed his hands in 10 years.” Gross. And it’s pretty obvious that the swamp Trump tried to drain in 2016 is full of sycophants who want to do irreparable harm to the future of Social Security, Medicare, immigration, reproductive rights, and beyond. Trump has set the precedent that anyone can be a government official. Literally anyone, including Elon Musk. And that needs to stop. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Elissa Slotkin for Michigan
subject: Dispatches from Senate orientation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2205%2E135344%2EX6Bh8h)

Friend,
I hope you have been taking the time to rest, recover, and process the results of the last couple of weeks.
I wanted to send you a note about what I’ve been up to – because after a few days of sleep, it was right back to work this week at Senate orientation (and taking votes as a member of the House!) – and I’ve compiled some of the highlights below.
On Tuesday, I joined all of the other freshmen Senators in DC. Check out a group photo of the new Democratic Senators:
We set up our new temporary office space in the Hart Building, named after legendary Michigan senator Phil Hart. I was the only freshman to escape the basement, and get a room with a window – it felt like Phil Hart’s spirit looking down on me!
A lot of Senate school is learning about the logistics of being in the Senate, like meeting with current members about how to set up an office, taking our ID pictures, and learning about employment rules and ethics regulations.
But as a history nerd, my favorite parts have been the glimpses into the history of the Senate and the founding of our country. We got to visit the vaults of the National Archives and see some of our sacred documents, including original hand-edits by the Senate to the Bill of Rights, the original, pre-Constitution Oath of Office, signed by George Washington promising NOT to support the King of England, and, just for me, the original documents that President Andrew Jackson signed officially making Michigan a state in 1837.
On top of that, we got a tour of the Old Senate Chamber, which housed the Senate from 1819-1859.
This week has definitely made me feel the weight of history, and I’m ready to get to work as a Senator in the new year. In the meantime, we’re wrapping up some important business in the House (where we get kicked out of our office right before Thanksgiving.) I’ll hopefully fit in a little rest and family time too!
Wishing you and yours the best,
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=2205%2E135344%2EX6Bh8h).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2205%2E135344%2EX6Bh8h)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: We must defend our immigrant neighbors.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
I will keep defending my undocumented neighbors and pushing for a humane immigration system. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW4FCz3t4Q22mMZ8ir_h6hOE9NhMgcSJZ0wNf8E2x7Pc8WVlRLWYTOsmCwWDmK7tQZLhxshIuxIwPU_KakZz8k0FXIAXYEtozvRqKkQTlIRSgxDZB0AbEtQEHsowkBAttQDMPzOhtWNcoEAJahXXg9IMjeBQ76KeS38D2TNz9Uk1buPCzjrQJO2AWQemaiCk37/4bj/NyVTiVaJSQWqYoup3b7T4w/h0/h001.-PD3fo7vzXiqZyJ6K90jBkflqsL1CF0nFc9nDfH_BSw)
---
Friend, If you’re an undocumented immigrant, I want you to know that you belong here and you are loved. I will have your back, as will grassroots groups like United We Dream—the nation’s largest immigrant youth-led network—in the fight for a humane immigration system and a liberated future where we can all thrive. **United We Dream has mobilized thousands of immigrant youth and allies through mass sit-ins, school walkouts, and shutdowns of Congressional offices and immigrant detention centers, winning policy victories like the DACA program to help undocumented immigrant youth live, work, and study here without threat of deportation.** Many of my neighbors are afraid as Trump plans to carry out the largest deportation effort in our country’s history, threatening to weaponize the same policy that sent Japanese Americans to internment camps. It’s time to support grassroots groups like United We Dream, which is already mobilizing to prevent mass deportations and pressuring the Biden-Harris administration to act in the next few weeks before Trump takes office. [**As Trump pledges to activate the military to round up undocumented immigrants into detention camps, we must defend our immigrant neighbors. Since mobilizing to enact the DACA program, United We Dream has continued to support people with DACA renewals and to expand protections for DACA recipients’ undocumented parents and spouses.
In response to the Obama administration's record number of deportations (which have increased with every following president), United We Dream launched the first and only volunteer-led national hotline to report inhumane behavior by ICE and local law enforcement.
During the first Trump administration, **United We Dream won sanctuary resolutions and state policies that limit cooperation with ICE, while pushing back against Trump’s attacks on DACA and Temporary Protected Status.** Some immigrant children are still separated from their families due to Trump’s cruel policies.
Unfortunately, President Biden continued many of Trump’s anti-immigrant policies and his administration has increased deportations and immigrant detention. Recently we’ve seen more Democrats normalize and participate in the dehumanization and demonization of immigrants.
That’s why **no matter who’s in power, United We Dream’s work to build immigrant community resilience is essential** ,**** including**** running their Undocuhealth program and creating safe spaces for people impacted by unjust anti-immigrant policies.
As United We Dream wrote after Election Day: _“Immigrants are here to stay. We’re ready to fight for our safety and our futures, and will continue to grow our movement of people ready to protect our communities at every turn.”_
