clean_body: Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst | Dear Peter, Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car – I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice. And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights: Newsweek : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, “Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?” Here’s what I said: “Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.” Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. They want me to pay $148 MILLION! It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York. But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored. Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House! That’s why I will KEEP FIGHTING for my God-given freedoms and rights. If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

| Donald Trump made it crystal clear that when re-elected, he’d try to repeal the Affordable Care Act... And Peter, it gets worse: **_House Republicans are joining him in this fight!_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97242718/512764074/1861431110?refcode=RTFC_20241117_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWMyZTI5ZC0yMGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fK1wOrHHhPxWBEFZky_TpoV0qDr4AqvbWkTaEVjG4v8=&emci=5c8c202c-bda2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=c9c2e29d-20a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=34594689) **Let me be clear:** Out-of-touch folks like Donald Trump should not be denying people healthcare when he's never had to worry about being able to afford an appointment, procedure, or medication in his life.

The truth is, nearly 3.8 million people in New York _ALONE_ rely on Medicare — and it’s no secret that the Bronx would be _especially_ hard-hit by this type of legislation.

**Repealing the Affordable Care Act is telling, Peter: It shows us _exactly_ where Republican priorities lie.**

Medicare is a lifeline for Americans, and I will fight like hell to protect (and expand!) it, but I need to know you’re with me: [**Do you support Republican plans to gut the Affordable Care Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97242719/512764075/1861431110?refcode=RTFC_20241117_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWMyZTI5ZC0yMGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fK1wOrHHhPxWBEFZky_TpoV0qDr4AqvbWkTaEVjG4v8=&emci=5c8c202c-bda2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=c9c2e29d-20a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=34594689) | [YES, I DO »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97242720/512764076/1861431110?refcode=RTFC_20241117_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWMyZTI5ZC0yMGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fK1wOrHHhPxWBEFZky_TpoV0qDr4AqvbWkTaEVjG4v8=&emci=5c8c202c-bda2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=c9c2e29d-20a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=34594689)

[I'M NOT SURE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97242722/512764078/1861431110?refcode=RTFC_20241117_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWMyZTI5ZC0yMGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fK1wOrHHhPxWBEFZky_TpoV0qDr4AqvbWkTaEVjG4v8=&emci=5c8c202c-bda2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=c9c2e29d-20a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=34594689)

We’re in this together, Peter.

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Greetings

The Young Democrats of America will gather for an exciting Winter Meeting from **December 6-8** in **Boston, Massachusetts**. This in-person event will bring together young leaders from across the nation for discussions and reflections on the 2024 election results, hands-on training sessions, important organizational business, and much more. **We want to remind you that today, November 17, is the final day to register at our early bird rate.** You can find all the information in this email on our website at **[yda.org/ydabos](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8mqfLav433QGxwS8LKF02-tc5qhDhhJOtrktTf5HsODWGqpi6BqSfjRTkmNZLSbLOLPPQwEZlenmw5HYbtqMmmD2rIICNvveGfyAbnAg38HTP35kFIUSLG05AZPdRR6xqxgYY9HUB5hh0UvUWXFLcs-ruwYHWeYm8826D9Odqgt-Ezk3TUI4RvEU-ZijPN66f8EldiNT8JVe03FE_6hIq_Ci1-PDmP-EwpiP0tbbBK8PRZJiKsNX9dwl3GvXzp-Ek1Cq8fIun-egkQHXMu45LCto/4bj/P-cgYWviT-KDTYrpwQP9Rw/h1/h001.6VLYy5BZZpkGjZnqHLtQusVFlsOoKHCEkF2h06M4avg)

**
****
* * *
**Registration
****
[Click here to register](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39ispmPgnyBeLzstfRs0GcNMmQ8i0Uu7JlJXUCxxrJCmVayzfdYy_WXbK15jiZ-HUDJl6k-hcG4ep2YipgWacCeEOjPqdkA7aH9CqFZFDV-oafLPhuJbh2Sg0JtH8evmyMH8JycRiZdvqukVakxf3HQCuB1B23OyUFa3urLNNtNFULV6gW47-9OrBSrmV2gdlNWWSPJxOREysvkiBrIjBIAE3Qcm_cpTuBfQZyDV5ezyPACu7m9eEbAPggT3uk5Le-SKjKvxjeVqihlE5qa3DLwaH8kD3dtBH3Ux2qvQa8iyUTWSF08gZXjPDY_egA2d0Himv3F_r328rvPNq8Qk3-_5w5lP4c1I_bhjEThSoqTew/4bj/P-cgYWviT-KDTYrpwQP9Rw/h2/h001.Ql-4cKJeLOKdRc0BeXMiqzZ7CG5jdQvs2dCxMMpwt7U) **at the early bird rate of **$60.00**. The early bird registration rate is valid until**November****17, 2024**.
****
* * *
**Reserving a Hotel Room
**
Lodging will be available at the Hyatt Place Boston Seaport (295 Northern Ave, Boston, MA). Hotel reservations must be made no later than**November****22, 2025**. **[Click here to book at our group rate of $175 per night](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdVsybNM-bPiGIibkHqcrG3E3PAR2nJO68kcdxKz2BRzj6fhxGEXyQzj-2QI6RXTLy8m0m-_EckzbXMbZWLFFRmtEQ1_OpXU25lI52_iGPx03U4r7lpcFgrm1VnZIzwa4443sRcBe21MPFcmSWPkktQ2kDEsehrffRWV3wdMFlnXUyPacSzV6hcjYYyP6IloYDA9xQnDQ_rNMf8tPywf2581KjuqRZiLhSWpLG_czpGidcgqppAJiKQSBWrj99z9z7CRSVmhR1pvp_X-ybgLhvQWXY874e8hvC8EcAEdeyOtuKQF_wmhIy6RzBqFHGbLOA/4bj/P-cgYWviT-KDTYrpwQP9Rw/h3/h001.YNlejzKVZuKyCagKFTXbNhFjp7pOE4NUlGMkw4VfMOM), **which includes access to a full breakfast bar and free Wi-Fi. _Please note that if you do not book through our special group rate, the current cost for the entire weekend is approximately $300 more.**
**_
* * *
**Sponsorship Opportunity**

Are you interested in sponsoring the Young Democrats of America meeting in Boston? Sponsorship offers a chance to support the next generation of leaders and gain recognition for your commitment to empowering young progressives. **[Click this link for more details on sponsorship levels and benefits](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ZinYHHf__6TfCzSdifLKcMzedmcfOzuy9LX84oSxZF1HEOcTJpXXgmtNzMjbJ4zu0UFDPYn9qdQzi6RBFlVOHv_cxoSyjkejjN2XbKAbJDF0ky3mSuIQNtmNQeyyk_lgpxOELJaYK5zQNbnoobrJ2jBJyqEZ8jPNbaBe5KbKaJUXDa994DDELT1WDD78JQvePlY4OGU_GB-J_8g1A4psolLaaVRkXv5xbKWR-jJA7ni1rDuMyw-0FVFVHuyq3LDOMoYrddaySSOx0yAlUD56LsNEohsFqlOVBYsECPB9c0QdXebgAepjtoMB193oVss4EOolmc4qIS6oHAL555jj/4bj/P-cgYWviT-KDTYrpwQP9Rw/h4/h001.jVCqavq7ZzfxEtddhaPXHwak-RGkrt4qQdryknTiCa0)**.****

* * *

| | You need to understand this ASAP. A handful of races remain uncalled. Let me be clear: Republicans are betting that Democrats will give up on these vital races that will determine how razor-thin their majority is in the House. Now more than ever, it is critical to show Republicans that we will continue fighting until EVERY vote is fairly counted. Each Democrat we elect will narrow Trump’s margins in the House – which is our best bet to stop Trump from threatening our health care, climate action, our fundamental freedoms and causing irrevocable damage to our Democracy. We cannot risk losing these races and letting Mike Johnson and his MAGA Majority rubber-stamp all of Trump’s far-right schemes. That’s why I set an ambitious goal to raise 5,000 donations in the next 9 hours. I know you are tired, spent, and ready to put this election behind us and start fresh. Team Casey

subject: Save Your Signs! 🗳️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Mitchell for Virginia**
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | |
---
|
Today, I am announcing my intentions to run for the Democratic Nomination for the Sixth Congressional District for the 2026 election. After a hard-fought race I am ready to take on the MAGA movement with renewed energy, a fresh vision, and a strategic plan rooted in the lessons learned from this past election cycle. I also want to take this time to thank each and every one of you for your immense support, hard work, and dedication during this past election cycle. It has truly meant the world to me and my team.
---
| Our democracy is at a crossroads. The people of the 6th District deserve a representative who fights for their rights, stands up against extremism, and puts working families first—not a rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda. We’re building a grassroots campaign powered by the people because it’s time for real change in Washington.
---
| With a commitment to listening to every voice and reaching every community, I will focus on key issues like protecting reproductive rights, expanding access to affordable healthcare, addressing climate change, and defending our democracy from right-wing extremism.
---
[Donate Now!](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=bc2ad79a75&e=0fced71d8c)
| Drawing on detailed data analysis and insights from their previous race, I have already begun laying the groundwork for a comprehensive field strategy. This grassroots approach is aimed at engaging with voters directly, knocking on doors, hosting community events, and ensuring that the concerns of the people are heard loud and clear in Washington. I plan to spend 2025 rebuilding connections throughout the sixth congressional district and being at each and every community event possible.
---
| Defeating MAGA extremism won't be easy, but with the power of the people behind us, we can make it happen. Together, we can build a better future for the sixth congressional district—one that values justice, equality, and opportunity for all.I know it's early, but we have a lot of work to do and no time can be wasted. Keep your yard signs, we are in this for the long haul.
---
| Join us in this fight. Together, we can bring real change to the 6th District!
---
[Donate Now!](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=0b78aafbfe&e=0fced71d8c)
| [**Can you donate $50, $100, or $250 dollars to help us defeat Ben Cline and reach more voters?**](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=e2a05f6008&e=0fced71d8c)
Join me in defeating Ben Cline and bringing real representation to the sixth congressional district.
**—Ken Mitchell, Democratic Candidate for Virginia’s 6th Congressional District**
---
[Donate Now!](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=4a780e1141&e=0fced71d8c)
| | | | | | | | **Authorized and Paid for by Ken Mitchell for Virginia**
PO Box 1795 Harrisonburg, VA 22803[Facebook](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=e412c50482&e=0fced71d8c)

|
---

[_why did I get this?_](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/about?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=548b15aa7d&e=0fced71d8c&c=001e4a878a) [unsubscribe from this list](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=548b15aa7d&t=b&e=0fced71d8c&c=001e4a878a) [update subscription preferences](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=548b15aa7d&e=0fced71d8c&c=001e4a878a)

name: The Democratic Party
subject: This work is now more important than ever
body:
Can we count on you?
---
$3. That is the donation we’re asking you to make to the DNC today. $3 because our work to build sustainable Democratic infrastructure for elections to come is more important than ever. $3 because we need to strengthen our state and local Democratic parties after a tough cycle. $3 because we need to ensure we don’t lose the organizing and tech infrastructure we’ve built up across the country. $3 because we need to put ourselves in the best position to win local and statewide races in 2025, take back Congress in 2026, and the White House in 2028. It’s a long game now, Derek, but the work to determine our future success starts today. [**Can we count on you to donate $3 to help us build a strong Democratic Party that will work day in and day out to elect Democrats up and down the ballot? name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Claim your Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
I’m reaching out to you today because I’d like to send you your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=fbfaa9469e294e719a417ecf8dbafe11&_t=w1JPFLwSMT8uPnH-P1znj7FJZgKpfOtZYp4KWKxjnUaJ4PYP1Y9nODRKAFGU7N8UGKiHs6-Eb_nY8O8sQkEJfHP2bo4zLbbF6EbSz1wE3l-DiaWAcMsmRZD_THZWMDWk)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fbfaa9469e294e719a417ecf8dbafe11&_e=K8ChGQtH7IguSxkUsmjmbA9n0_O_2Q5g3uMNl19gB_YNcrbRcwXwKB1m2j9BmtlhPcr0ktMyUh_NS6y6AG1ClrUE_5te867QJbXxZN7i2e9P5ygCylWxRPrHWsbvkAMYWdFi3yhzE6OtmHEgBym9DQ__75XHfq4rKM8wlnLfzCEMWjFy0cd2S7a-YRlg_q6M2VIB5rTqowFlO5qJrCjzuqHDNTPVTfsMOW_y8y9UIwdQAX8_LTB5Vpl2Jnn47BbkFMTASiVxb1TJE2pEW6TpZvIHUFnuozTh3pERYsK58HTmtq9iwEjVyG5CvD3JB2XT89m3k07CsrIN4AEMsjISPvB1YPo4VNJDc6-tfk21lCrGXHl3RDnmeyxmCM2UJcvgYGkfmQIAaKubwS-8Mr1HgQ%3D%3D)
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to get the 2025 calendar.

**Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before November 30 by clicking on this secure link:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fbfaa9469e294e719a417ecf8dbafe11&_e=K8ChGQtH7IguSxkUsmjmbA9n0_O_2Q5g3uMNl19gB_YNcrbRcwXwKB1m2j9BmtlhPcr0ktMyUh_NS6y6AG1ClrUE_5te867QJbXxZN7i2e9P5ygCylWxRPrHWsbvkAMYWdFi3yhzE6OtmHEgBym9DQ__75XHfq4rKM8wlnLfzCEMWjFy0cd2S7a-YRlg_q6M2VIB5rTqowFlO5qJrCjzuqHDNTPVTfsMOW_y8y9UIwfUVe8PAoQ8EGOEbs1v073_bk6yjDcqLsJ1ahXgi4n4f4kWI_2Dd0gQbkzNBvTEkVsbuJTH0I_PG-A9s0xZhYQcx8ZDqoozoGsOwUNxAVOWmHPYHS7oQWOvE8jUdsPyN6b5KBOnWaijcqzectGSoW8suo_DBnkH1Pt8H7g67KGACQ%3D%3D)

As you know, we live in an era of increasing bureaucratic despotism. You've seen it, and you understand. More and more, we are ruled by an administrative state that operates without the say of our elected representatives.

It is, therefore, completely **unaccountable** to "we the people."

This collapse of the separation of powers has spread far beyond the federal level into our states, our cities, and maybe even where you live!

One particularly disturbing example is in our K-12 schools...

At these schools, swarms of administrators impose dangerous ideologies and actively undermine parents.

In higher education--especially at taxpayer-funded state universities--bloated administrations push ideologies that teach young Americans to disrespect or even hate their country.

But thanks to our supporters, we remain free of this corrupting influence. We stay true to our mission...

...to provide "sound learning" that preserves "the blessings of civil and religious liberty."

Indeed, as the crisis in our nation has deepened in recent years, we have redoubled our efforts to extend this mission nationwide. But we've only been able to do so thanks to supporters like you.

**Just in the last year, our dedicated supporters have helped to ...**
* **Teach 4 million Americans in Hillsdale 's _free_ online courses**, including "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism," and our newest course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

* **Distribute hundreds of thousands of free copies of the Constitution** to citizens nationwide--especially younger Americans, especially thousands of K-12 students.

* **Provide an American classical education** to young students nationwide through K-12 education programs, returning excellence and proper civics instruction to K-12 classrooms.

* **Expand the circulation of _Imprimis_** , Hillsdale's monthly digest of liberty, to more than 6.7 million households and businesses.

I hope you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar** so that when you use it next year, you'll remember how you can advance the important work of defending liberty through education.

Remember, your support is especially crucial because we refuse every penny of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT!

Your generosity, and that of tens of thousands of people like you, reaches and teaches millions of Americans nationwide. You'll help enroll millions more Americans in free online courses, expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , and restore excellence to K-12 education.

**Please show your support today by making your best tax-deductible gift of $50, $75, or $150 --or the best gift you can--by clicking the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fbfaa9469e294e719a417ecf8dbafe11&_e=K8ChGQtH7IguSxkUsmjmbA9n0_O_2Q5g3uMNl19gB_YNcrbRcwXwKB1m2j9BmtlhPcr0ktMyUh_NS6y6AG1ClrUE_5te867QJbXxZN7i2e9P5ygCylWxRPrHWsbvkAMYWdFi3yhzE6OtmHEgBym9DQ__75XHfq4rKM8wlnLfzCEMWjFy0cd2S7a-YRlg_q6M2VIB5rTqowFlO5qJrCjzuqHDNTPVTfsMOW_y8y9UIwf3bGY2Clf4fl6WsQjomvXZCJy5W42ypcmk1wz9KbvnU9Cuh89hgmeT7dBRAEoKi24wyIZ6kWT_BjSZlYwkrKZDUPGJ7l-OZ0LndU-c0R6dXczzLFuPqZBmIDRvjpthOrJ9_UaFPvytWlGlKYWYPt7JxnAp3KvAsRfKW97iQETZAQ%3D%3D)

And when you do, you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**. But you must act before November 30.

Thank you for being a steadfast Hillsdale supporter. Your generosity is needed now more than ever.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. **Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before November 30 at the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fbfaa9469e294e719a417ecf8dbafe11&_e=K8ChGQtH7IguSxkUsmjmbA9n0_O_2Q5g3uMNl19gB_YNcrbRcwXwKB1m2j9BmtlhPcr0ktMyUh_NS6y6AG1ClrUE_5te867QJbXxZN7i2e9P5ygCylWxRPrHWsbvkAMYWdFi3yhzE6OtmHEgBym9DQ__75XHfq4rKM8wlnLfzCEMWjFy0cd2S7a-YRlg_q6M2VIB5rTqowFlO5qJrCjzuqHDNTPVTfsMOW_y8y9UIwf_E5oJJIeQ72RSSQZeV2V3cL65gL-8ePigLf2EblRqDyEi5mREX72NTUjzVeyL5_ovHv9KmeL3aneXMUfSyOHF1Ho1gVbFcEHP8LW7db6pz4wPJwUYQszCewP2G6fuhVcabhMWIbiXVXix0si21_6T6cKHmVKCBHhBhf74z1wHfw%3D%3D)

When you do, you will defend liberty and help us accomplish our mission year after year. **Everything we accomplish is only possible due to your continued generosity, so thank you for your support of our mission!**
---
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=fbfaa9469e294e719a417ecf8dbafe11&_t=w1JPFLwSMT8uPnH-P1znj7FJZgKpfOtZYp4KWKxjnUaJ4PYP1Y9nODRKAFGU7N8UGKiHs6-Eb_nY8O8sQkEJfFr15B-bZrJYCYB9mQ5X8nCqdRn9cUZCMwbwvKTwepA10YOsSM3eHdFj5plNMuZ44HM6IG4zQTOrzPyp6bowghA%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=fbfaa9469e294e719a417ecf8dbafe11&_t=w1JPFLwSMT8uPnH-P1znj7FJZgKpfOtZYp4KWKxjnUaJ4PYP1Y9nODRKAFGU7N8UGKiHs6-Eb_nY8O8sQkEJfHP2bo4zLbbF6EbSz1wE3l-DiaWAcMsmRZD_THZWMDWk).
| |

name: NRSC HQ
subject: What did you make of the election results?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We want to know your thoughts

Fellow American,

Republicans in the Senate are compiling a list of the _**[grassroots patriots from your state](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=673fcff7994b40e5b4e4e2c333f1aa7d&_e=4vQVAY4FiinELqizdFsZwymEL_F8HKKcugR_6BaLQ3wSjE1W6mjJHBcBVulWe4ZksS4T9mGPygqN7vYezfih6DID2k6QqBCsGhhBqGszt14QUtFqnAXm5VZfLXav6yaRfO8oCwExKPYFogFi4Oa--1YysczIWQ8uWP1dipM6U0TjQNfEnfbUimoyFY1z4cq8yRhkcLlld6yTlvsRTn43eFgZo4wgpuZLa_pgXCoO94RI6JSYV-LtTytYFMHaV5n7zDf8bzED_oFbhqtE-q54no07to6OW2jwG8Z27RL2EwQXAJaVVkVG3bPI8Cnzdxlpk8HG2WfV_RhrGQIZIAS_9zNudeTBLGbRoeeS37SvHULMS_AZ1yKQ5Ir8J77IIFyrg-SiH8YfPqDXIRUy4RCzhjaa94OuoJiRFRs4Pgv9s-T6_dGygMkYva79fLkEh2hZkPAKoDmBHJ9VxIjSmHegFBBuIB7xssAyb8rnuXdOJG4%3D)**_ we know who helped deliver us the Senate Majority.

And as a follow up, we need to know where you stand.
_**[Are you still a Republican? name: Jenna Burns
subject: Targeting my husband and President Trump
body:
For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.
Dear Peter,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=912af110690d42a887424ee6946ec0a0&_e=04qns38jYN-55zNhCfYRmjQa3FkCzFi6rDXOd66SgvAytMKQA6aH-DgDlICzq3VWZspZwQvQacTrRW44EkVpWYBy0A5PgvdkHJtwQfuXOggnTHoxjrLU9R3d4GlV_VheDsjzOMQ4J6_4Zo-taKUyGR7YbJ38wKs2zjEVZB7J1Da3P3Nz05UZwzwWqoP3Wf-KEhiAM9yTl_Gel9LbXbHX_oTiphqnWshz0rI4pF2tOxICyR-h7TEwbFEaSaDtoa950d0og5Kelkgs3aChKIN_Hw7ODvjDPoYk0NtUUOxV9thFHrsyiPaqhiMbHziY25nW0tEP1oWBKltqiBtN-tsYgbkh4zQri0SoW7_h0-iM6zzEcKnsnPEEFy3GG4sDvCHWKH5g2x7W7OSC0V57N1Hd5Q%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=912af110690d42a887424ee6946ec0a0&_e=04qns38jYN-55zNhCfYRmjQa3FkCzFi6rDXOd66SgvAytMKQA6aH-DgDlICzq3VWZspZwQvQacTrRW44EkVpWYBy0A5PgvdkHJtwQfuXOggnTHoxjrLU9R3d4GlV_VheDsjzOMQ4J6_4Zo-taKUyGR7YbJ38wKs2zjEVZB7J1Da3P3Nz05UZwzwWqoP3Wf-KEhiAM9yTl_Gel9LbXbHX_oTiphqnWshz0rI4pF2tOxICyR-h7TEwbFEaSaDtoa95eRQEWAcnHgMN9lczijj1RTTQvCO2aj4eFupMhu6lDpgmtshKbHXjovhZh2m5ZZW7ok3kKyq5xzQtyupBvICFMz4XfKp6kzyEmmCZ7nb2Ql6ZyzTXcqPBx6wW8v1pxdq5-iSRKX7valKwZxL4JNtGvA%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=912af110690d42a887424ee6946ec0a0&_e=04qns38jYN-55zNhCfYRmjQa3FkCzFi6rDXOd66SgvAytMKQA6aH-DgDlICzq3VWZspZwQvQacTrRW44EkVpWYBy0A5PgvdkHJtwQfuXOggnTHoxjrLU9R3d4GlV_VheDsjzOMQ4J6_4Zo-taKUyGR7YbJ38wKs2zjEVZB7J1Da3P3Nz05UZwzwWqoP3Wf-KEhiAM9yTl_Gel9LbXbHX_oTiphqnWshz0rI4pF2tOxICyR-h7TEwbFEaSaDtoa95tL137A2I5ytZCImTOi-h2zHqrlImMoC6oTcJT21TZq0M9c1f721qBTZhQCh_kKCJDJWYqvC8nYyArPg9s2MSTZDXt0i4jwq5nLDO-aHWVCRVBrfrhEKi8mlWfqSGzgb52_zbQ5S1pFONNzJAhFCYfQ%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=912af110690d42a887424ee6946ec0a0&_e=04qns38jYN-55zNhCfYRmjQa3FkCzFi6rDXOd66SgvAytMKQA6aH-DgDlICzq3VWZspZwQvQacTrRW44EkVpWYBy0A5PgvdkHJtwQfuXOggnTHoxjrLU9R3d4GlV_VheDsjzOMQ4J6_4Zo-taKUyGR7YbJ38wKs2zjEVZB7J1Da3P3Nz05UZwzwWqoP3Wf-KEhiAM9yTl_Gel9LbXbHX_oTiphqnWshz0rI4pF2tOxICyR-h7TEwbFEaSaDtoa957QhOehCPnbTFFs19hh1RMv4PdIDySwO34_ZMIWKSQIdQ_i7DxyNsdK7Z5oBwzKEMOnB9GgTtfdhOD9C4Xq2pzGoxAK7f46UiW2PJg9-hJbvIlxlI7oaCyw6UA4enkv8uhQpTWZZw2ifJYrvNEIJwZw%3D%3D)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=912af110690d42a887424ee6946ec0a0&_e=04qns38jYN-55zNhCfYRmjQa3FkCzFi6rDXOd66SgvAytMKQA6aH-DgDlICzq3VWZspZwQvQacTrRW44EkVpWYBy0A5PgvdkHJtwQfuXOggnTHoxjrLU9R3d4GlV_VheDsjzOMQ4J6_4Zo-taKUyGR7YbJ38wKs2zjEVZB7J1Da3P3Nz05UZwzwWqoP3Wf-KEhiAM9yTl_Gel9LbXbHX_oTiphqnWshz0rI4pF2tOxICyR-h7TEwbFEaSaDtoa95Tjsa3oVnZZmTrzPPi3JLV_HYC4SfePdSLwE0AYQCmq54WYv3v6Zqe62vxqZFWpkPfQDYbmmdwjtx0gYCPCi-eIr9HGgEo46vakG3fZVPsIGWPofAMRfJE1DvuGUU8kC3qpWEJzYA2l6eCBVHiMpWSA%3D%3D)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=912af110690d42a887424ee6946ec0a0&_e=04qns38jYN-55zNhCfYRmjQa3FkCzFi6rDXOd66SgvAytMKQA6aH-DgDlICzq3VWZspZwQvQacTrRW44EkVpWYBy0A5PgvdkHJtwQfuXOggnTHoxjrLU9R3d4GlV_VheDsjzOMQ4J6_4Zo-taKUyGR7YbJ38wKs2zjEVZB7J1Da3P3Nz05UZwzwWqoP3Wf-KEhiAM9yTl_Gel9LbXbHX_oTiphqnWshz0rI4pF2tOxICyR-h7TEwbFEaSaDtoa95bz-m2YYS0nJ7udq-aithu9gV7koxDhHNqFZdGDQnxRyuH5ql9fspYC69Pd3IuEvEQhfl11ssNkNcUe56j-4YdRxQjB4uWOhJYDBAy1Zb7c9xc5zgpsOMcT9QQ4f7bYB5-Tm6qExkVnicUtvNsxjCBg%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=912af110690d42a887424ee6946ec0a0&_e=04qns38jYN-55zNhCfYRmjQa3FkCzFi6rDXOd66SgvAytMKQA6aH-DgDlICzq3VWZspZwQvQacTrRW44EkVpWYBy0A5PgvdkHJtwQfuXOggnTHoxjrLU9R3d4GlV_VheDsjzOMQ4J6_4Zo-taKUyGR7YbJ38wKs2zjEVZB7J1Da3P3Nz05UZwzwWqoP3Wf-KEhiAM9yTl_Gel9LbXbHX_oTiphqnWshz0rI4pF2tOxICyR-h7TEwbFEaSaDtoa95OzB0IZTqcc-jSDip1rQtPKXR-Ufm40Gg7l2S6Frp3FU-riuK6lS7aLR7m8eiI_4d6ZXhO7HOc2N9lIRITixtu-59iR0a4nrxzRN0l6SzhEFrHVRykwDrUiVhw9ve-sWGDBmMfF4zVXPVBidTUivWnA%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. Dear Peter, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. Peter, we know things feel hard right now.
There’s so much we don’t know, but there’s something we still can do to fight back.
**Bob Casey’s Senate race in Pennsylvania is still too close to call.** There are thousands of ballots left to be counted, and Pennsylvanians deserve to have their voices heard.
**If you’re scared, if you’re angry, you can do something with that:** [**Donate $****5****or more right now to ensure that we continue this important work.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241117-5?refcode=em20241117-5&refcode2=4865_552475_W3L-f-&akid=4865%2E552475%2EW3L-f-)
[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241117-5?amount=15&refcode=em20241117-5-el&refcode2=4865_552475_W3L-f-&akid=4865%2E552475%2EW3L-f-) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241117-5?amount=25&refcode=em20241117-5-el&refcode2=4865_552475_W3L-f-&akid=4865%2E552475%2EW3L-f-) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241117-5?amount=50&refcode=em20241117-5-el&refcode2=4865_552475_W3L-f-&akid=4865%2E552475%2EW3L-f-) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241117-5?amount=100&refcode=em20241117-5-el&refcode2=4865_552475_W3L-f-&akid=4865%2E552475%2EW3L-f-) [Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241117-5?amount=250&refcode=em20241117-5-el&refcode2=4865_552475_W3L-f-&akid=4865%2E552475%2EW3L-f-) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241117-5?refcode=em20241117-5&refcode2=4865_552475_W3L-f-&akid=4865%2E552475%2EW3L-f-)

name: Royce White
subject: Trump has won
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
Mission accomplished
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=9d8d74635e07408087f606b6fc816417&_e=PWghh-1eBGegjKLgsh4KBwkQ4jJKrfnjQfxfn3RAqRSn7HNecueXUg6v5IWUKkpVVI9N4wy9_ws3cokgwuM6N002qhQzzJOgMawTB9-ePWyjE-x6Qet9gjHw7Vwy3IIQ2c6Jbwuazr-TJ3q5rZPPfneBp1SWlpA7Zr3A-jLe5972RKdQ13WfLjExdIVlsMa_n4PMUkra0T6t_-xuHEovmL0bXPbUyPox2H5_H5qTYGAbz98Cl9YnqMBS7taLVH7KITdIyf65pTXpTQmmZoFIhzVov0eitiZuaTxAF9B3s7Fi6kDA0g8oFN2D3xML2DKkyPWkJVZAgZKHc_AhffxFPA%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

Trump has won... Mission accomplished. Everybody knows it.

In Minnesota, we saw what we needed to see. We got the information we needed to get. When the swamp controls the mainstream media, donors, and count... All we can do is give people the information and an option. I was unknown enough to undercut; Trump isn't. They think they can wait him out and gum up his term. When he's gone, who will we put up next? Calling my race at 50%, dumping Hennepin ballots 3 hours later. We will continue to fight. These things take time; we know where we need to go and what we need to do. It's not about the count; it's about the perception and the people.

| [ **HELP ME FIGHT** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=9d8d74635e07408087f606b6fc816417&_e=PWghh-1eBGegjKLgsh4KBwkQ4jJKrfnjQfxfn3RAqRSn7HNecueXUg6v5IWUKkpVVI9N4wy9_ws3cokgwuM6N002qhQzzJOgMawTB9-ePWyjE-x6Qet9gjHw7Vwy3IIQ2c6Jbwuazr-TJ3q5rZPPfneBp1SWlpA7Zr3A-jLe5972RKdQ13WfLjExdIVlsMa_L1h3MHzOdtWxvHnu71YZ3KMFyoJ920Qt_xr29WeXkh2-flKbmtEqEOI70J1VUsewJMuMuNAvWt1z3D98LGw1g3kQ7kTKrHRWRCfVrdTS32KhWtXc894yi76yG6Bn4i_HX8jW4yJhd13luLEIHRdZcA%3D%3D)
---

**We don't have the resources to lawyer up and fight the corruption, or you all know I would in a heartbeat.**

We can and will get to work on 26' and 28' starting right now. Jump Ball!

I held my tongue, but this Minnesota Republican party must change--and the party nationwide must change. How many times do we have to watch the metro areas fall in statewide races? The reason is we're not there. Honestly, we've basically abandoned the Minnesota inner cities--not at election time but all year. Then, when they dump all these ballots, people believe it. Well, I don't.

We won't take a single backstep. We must clean this stuff up starting now. The American people know something isn't right. They feel they see it. The last person they could let get to that U.S. Senate is me, out of everybody in the country. I take on the best of the best for a reason. Control of The Senate? Don't make me laugh... How many America 1st Senators are there? Watch how quickly they fund the same managed decline of our nation.

Thank you to all the Minnesotans and everybody across the country supporting us. We have just begun! Watch the skullduggery overnight. Trump has to go to work on these people quickly. They are not his friends.

**[Can you rush a donation before midnight to help me hit the ground running as I work to FLIP the inner cities of America for Republicans?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=9d8d74635e07408087f606b6fc816417&_e=PWghh-1eBGegjKLgsh4KBwkQ4jJKrfnjQfxfn3RAqRSn7HNecueXUg6v5IWUKkpVVI9N4wy9_ws3cokgwuM6N002qhQzzJOgMawTB9-ePWyjE-x6Qet9gjHw7Vwy3IIQ2c6Jbwuazr-TJ3q5rZPPfneBp1SWlpA7Zr3A-jLe5972RKdQ13WfLjExdIVlsMa_T7DgpRwAQu04AVj4vjLfKhgCqsyfk_rm8yx15zgP1OBiO2hr-jr8eMha82cmx7_1Y0tno5EpFkwqvGhsJN-5ECG-3AyKvv7YU_vKL6iBsfNYRtwqKSdujQIgJ7y0-cWf0qyGEuOTHKJyPGJultG13A%3D%3D)**

Talk soon,
Royce White

PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

---

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: Winged Victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=252dd10b4b&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Dear Freedom Fighters,
“My aim is not to pass new laws, but to repeal them.”
~ Barry Goldwater
This past Tuesday both the Senate and House newly elected members voted for its new leadership teams. Following the leadership vote in the Senate, the first [press release](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=31c3d64a68&e=a7ab36849c) went out outlining which Senator and Senator-elect would chair and vice chair certain standing committees. Then, by week’s end more information was [released](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=49f28d05ce&e=a7ab36849c) regarding membership of those Senate standing committees. As you can see, I was asked to Chair both the Senate’s standing committee on Regulatory Affairs & Government Reform and Ethics which is a statutory committee. I am also a member on two standing committees: Senate Finance and Senate Judiciary & Elections. [Please reach out to my legislative office if you have legislative ideas.](mailto:sbolick@azleg.gov?subject=Legislative%20ideas) I have quite a few ideas that have been brought to my attention over the last year that missed the Senate's bill filing deadline so they will take priority. Hopefully, this week the House issues a statement about their committee assignments.

On Wednesday, I finally had an opportunity to tour Arizona Humane Society’s newest [campus](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c38fe7d88c&e=a7ab36849c) that sits on nearly 5-acres by Papago Park. As an animal lover, it’s always great to meet non-profit organizations in the area who are trying their best to help animals get adopted to offering end of life care for your fur baby. If your family is ready to adopt a dog, cat, or bunny, you can [check out](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=51d9912029&e=a7ab36849c) some beautiful animals who are ready to become part of your family. If you are not ready to adopt, but are interested in fostering, you can see how by visiting their [website](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a303cec16b&e=a7ab36849c). You too can [schedule a tour](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=720c5177ee&e=a7ab36849c) of this new facility if you’re interested.

Later in the afternoon, I headed over to the State Senate to meet with junior and senior high school students across Arizona who are part of the [U.S. Senate Youth Program](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=783b5a5ccb&e=a7ab36849c). It is always fun to engage with future leaders in our state who are interested hearing about what it’s like to be a public official.

On Thursday morning, I had the opportunity to tour Nestle’s new Beverage Factory in Glendale. This 630,000 square foot facility became operational over the summer. So far, they have invested nearly $975 million in this new facility, including $43 million in their water recycling facility. This factory will produce high-quality creamers, including Coffee Mate, Natural Bliss, and Starbucks brands. This facility is the company’s most technologically advanced factory and distribution center and has a lot of land to expand when demand rises, especially from Gen Z. Nestle is interested in a small carbon sustainable footprint to meet future environmental and energy regulations. They are most interested in water conservation through water recycling to reuse up to 95% of their treated process water for factory related utility processes. They are hiring more than 300 employees for this location. If you are interested in working for Nestle, email this location at [USGlendaleAZHR@nestle.com](mailto:USGlendaleAZHR@nestle.com) to learn what positions are currently available.

On Friday morning, I attended the Arizona Tax Research Association (ATRA) Outlook Conference. ATRA conference attendees received so much good information about the economic outlook for our state, including a revenue and budget update from Richard Stavneak, the Director of the Joint Legislative Budget Committee (JLBC) and an update from ATRA staff about issues we will face next legislative session.

Yesterday afternoon, I got inked. I had considered getting a tattoo when I was in college and ultimately decided against it. Also, after my last term in the House ended, I joked about adding four slash marks to my ankle commemorating my stint as an elected official. Now, nearing my 50-year life milestone, I figured this has been quite the year for our family, so let’s close this chapter with some ink. In the late spring, I started to think about what I would do once I won my November 5th election. I considered a tattoo of Joan of Arc and Atlas, too. If you have been closely following this year, you know. If you have ever heard how my husband and I met, you might enjoy this tale even more. Back in 1999, my future husband-to-be asked one of my work colleagues about me. You see, Clint first laid eyes on me during a school choice meeting hosted at The Heritage Foundation with other intellectual thought leaders in the school choice movement. Following the meeting, he sent emails to a few of my work colleagues asking, “who was the goddess seated next to Bruno Manno?” So now, I have the [Goddess of Victory](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1abe679dd4&e=a7ab36849c) inked on my right ankle. As many of you know, “Winged Victory” also sits atop the copper dome of the Old Arizona Capitol. There hasn't been a day I have worked at the Capitol that I don't look up at her.

On Saturday evening, I stopped by ABATE of Arizona’s annual meeting. In 2021, I sponsored the continuation of the [Motorcycle Safety Fund](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c3fe6ec2c7&e=a7ab36849c) while I was a State Representative. Their association has also recognized me as their "Freedom Fighter" each year I have served at the Capitol. I look forward to working with ABATE next session to ensure this fund continues to help motorcyclists receive the necessary grants for their safety training. Later in the evening, I stopped by The O’Connor Institute’s annual event. In 2020, I sponsored [legislation](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8a4982bf10&e=a7ab36849c) commemorating September 25th as Sandra Day O’Connor Civics Education Day. This past legislative session there was a concerted effort to try to whittle down some of the civics education the legislature has passed over the past eight years, but thankfully they didn’t succeed.

I hope you all are finally enjoying our fall weather. I very much look forward to getting back to work at the Capitol. It is an honor to continue to serve you.

Best,

---

| |
---

name: DLCC Membership Team
subject: Here is how we fight back:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. | | |
---
| |
---|---
| 🛑**There’s no sugarcoating it: Our party faced major setbacks on Election Day. But if you want to keep fighting for our democracy, our rights, our freedoms, and our future, please keep reading.** 👇
---
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers.

Without Congress, these majorities will provide a much-needed check to oppose the worst of the incoming administration.

**Expanding Democratic power in statehouses across the country is the best way to counteract the damage of a second Trump presidency.**
---
We’re committed to building our largest membership team in DLCC history to fight back against the dangerous extremism of Trump and his allies by building Democratic majorities from the ground up.

As one of our most dedicated supporters, we need you on this team standing alongside us.

Donations from our members each year directly fuel our work to:

✅ Compete in majority-making special elections
✅ Chip away at Republican supermajorities
✅ Identify and flip vulnerable GOP-held seats
_And so much more..._

clean_body: When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. | | | | | ---|--- | 🛑There’s no sugarcoating it: Our party faced major setbacks on Election Day. But if you want to keep fighting for our democracy, our rights, our freedoms, and our future, please keep reading. 👇 When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. Without Congress, these majorities will provide a much-needed check to oppose the worst of the incoming administration. Expanding Democratic power in statehouses across the country is the best way to counteract the damage of a second Trump presidency. We’re committed to building our largest membership team in DLCC history to fight back against the dangerous extremism of Trump and his allies by building Democratic majorities from the ground up. As one of our most dedicated supporters, we need you on this team standing alongside us. body:
Join fellow MAGA supporters in thanking Elon for his dedication.
[Thank you, Elon Musk!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dcbba87992014aa5acb43b8814e64e07&_e=OHqf7qPj3_jbDpTyCCpfm4MtOPoMLNSiahS4Knr48d49ScmL3qPu6oogELt1oKhGPw4X_09ntC3S6qWTw-8AelqYo044yy-JoPemr3h-M7Ivux7SGnVO6GKZKlqXGiwWnd03dxobdTZeVZN3f4lzusCZbCC_48oD-BWKQePEfF8N8waLN5Pwt4SB4ca1zsExyeoBz_w0O3_sT5RHhwDlf4xvnY8CTg5Cn0rM7E6ZU1b0WZJe2KjoLbaDEBwxTudDK072QOrYxT-TluOXbCzCcHbBpJY2djRsF4emfJ1ukpKL4ox3CoMTcxrvu0jLQe6Z1YVvpipbLo0VBjGcgv2ar9ZtMMAzYr_S-epfyl2-wb0avQ3JmAqmBbX6p_rRK1yDEoUbesv7O3uwbBrG4ctFmnKJb8Byh_5TGrrnC_nvGWI9_yVyNXJ6A1MrrsQtfCufTZtn5xl6VXbOQFitU7BcNw%3D%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dcbba87992014aa5acb43b8814e64e07&_e=OHqf7qPj3_jbDpTyCCpfm4MtOPoMLNSiahS4Knr48d49ScmL3qPu6oogELt1oKhGPw4X_09ntC3S6qWTw-8AelqYo044yy-JoPemr3h-M7Ivux7SGnVO6GKZKlqXGiwWnd03dxobdTZeVZN3f4lzusCZbCC_48oD-BWKQePEfF8N8waLN5Pwt4SB4ca1zsExyeoBz_w0O3_sT5RHhwDlf4xvnY8CTg5Cn0rM7E6ZU1b0WZJe2KjoLbaDEBwxTudDK072QOrYxT-TluOXbCzCcHbBpJY2djRsF4emfJ1ukpIqTUWUhJt5NW08PxH4U0DUhbS04u4VYaTJlQNj9vlqqAFo8ZNOL2IHl-6O9IEIee-ZkftN6S02PGXDgpELNSq5M56t9Jeug4NPd2hKBretIbeU2wbXydFXLb-quIjV0KnRyghu0MEetbmsugX-LF4smhy3yL3cpQEj2kJJ_VTeXA%3D%3D)

Peter,

Thanks to supporters like you, and allies like Elon Musk, we're _**[celebrating a huge victory](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dcbba87992014aa5acb43b8814e64e07&_e=OHqf7qPj3_jbDpTyCCpfm4MtOPoMLNSiahS4Knr48d49ScmL3qPu6oogELt1oKhGPw4X_09ntC3S6qWTw-8AelqYo044yy-JoPemr3h-M7Ivux7SGnVO6GKZKlqXGiwWnd03dxobdTZeVZN3f4lzusCZbCC_48oD-BWKQePEfF8N8waLN5Pwt4SB4ca1zsExyeoBz_w0O3_sT5RHhwDlf4xvnY8CTg5Cn0rM7E6ZU1b0WZJe2KjoLbaDEBwxTudDK072QOrYxT-TluOXbCzCcHbBpJY2djRsF4emfJ1ukpLXce1n1zF1EXs93hGmt2gw8bSO25YlOb19MdtJfzzlS6nxKcdLjRUTZK2XVYSE2pwMWtfxzfPcv4znk3ffugI64T52S_O70nn1lvg8k0vlufkZtj529ibKsGE6TIEAdqW9Upo11C-H1sTeKQ9sbL9ru8EU0dvARaJC1BQ-dGoM_w%3D%3D)**_ as Donald Trump has been elected the 47th President of the United States.

Hey Peter, Though we saw some historic victories in Democratic turnout this year, the election results have us restructuring our strategy for 2026. Because if we learned anything, it’s that we need to reconnect and win back voters in every corner of the Peach State. Now more than ever, we have to demonstrate that every community matters. That’s why we want you to be part of the conversation as we plan for the fight to come. _What issues should Democrats prioritize more looking ahead?
What should our strategy look like moving forward?
Where should we focus our efforts?_ [Before our survey closes at midnight tonight, will you help us pave the way by answering just a few short questions? ⬇️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97244575/512770840/-360047787?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_111724_1_4_KGB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTViNWZhNi0zYWE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iEodWna0U-ttzs4bJO_D7NK6oHD1KV26j-nOYolgLsQ=&emci=705b5fa6-3aa5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=755b5fa6-3aa5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=43566853) | | **[TAKE SURVEY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97244576/512770841/-360047787?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_111724_1_4_KGB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTViNWZhNi0zYWE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iEodWna0U-ttzs4bJO_D7NK6oHD1KV26j-nOYolgLsQ=&emci=705b5fa6-3aa5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=755b5fa6-3aa5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=43566853)**

name: Lila Rose
subject: Do you think kids should hear THIS in schools?
body:
The “educator” in the video tells young people: “It’s time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity.”

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=76c8ebdfb60b46079d385f8e93f4665f&_t=EDJ3iuIvALv_z9OW_7fGZHG1oSpkqB57ZQKr2k3xfHKE0vTZIk6fHq_hS_tW2vUu9hyHqKVLCkXepLz91zTSmQ1VLKg9wzbUKCdEp7dICIx324VUy6-7MCRAb2epiZtm)_

[ ](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=76c8ebdfb60b46079d385f8e93f4665f&_e=1Z9HgiHL7Jfu2-p52gw98y_ghcTnYbxsaPQhhb4G30oTol5_OJihCgBykS0gq1u3v0DpRAuswOrXGbuwWPfhJ44EfeN8Z7g_hsh_pPVNWZY1Rt19MsKtYDtgNbK-XfJWI_lFbJFrRMKjoym17DhZCb-eWYDKS1HyELwD68CtCJhV64_jfc6HZeonuhYy8HXZ-sR9AaPi29GV3rqVNmXuXqmnQ2JOXGsII3NgjlBpSuRLmyJY7EWZi-M1MLvFPSir2F5cGi2lOFOlirHZL0iyRTQ8y4-SmBsBmKIZTY6iymfLvgjsgVPHquE_WvC48Vhumyp-1AlE8H40-VTfPZxReCacl5t7noYuXYg6LWXgGhc%3D)
#
Friend of Life,

Planned Parenthood just came out with a new video that calls virginity "made up" and a "social construct."

The "educator" in the video tells young people: "It's time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity."

Instead of seeing it as "losing something," Planned Parenthood encourages impressionable teens to experiment sexually because "all of these myths around sex and virginity can be so hurtful and overwhelming."

Planned Parenthood is grooming the next generation for abortion. Promoting risky sexual practices to young people ultimately leads them to broken relationships and more children killed in the womb.

**Will you help fight back against Planned Parenthood 's anti-family, pro-death agenda? I'm asking 50 people to step forward today with a $50 gift to help us put our life-saving videos into classrooms nationwide**. **[https://give.liveaction.org/stop-planned-parenthood-mms/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=76c8ebdfb60b46079d385f8e93f4665f&_e=1Z9HgiHL7Jfu2-p52gw98y_ghcTnYbxsaPQhhb4G30oTol5_OJihCgBykS0gq1u3v0DpRAuswOrXGbuwWPfhJ44EfeN8Z7g_hsh_pPVNWZY1Rt19MsKtYDtgNbK-XfJWI_lFbJFrRMKjoym17DhZCb-eWYDKS1HyELwD68CtCJhV64_jfc6HZeonuhYy8HXZ-sR9AaPi29GV3rqVNmXuXk1gKllN9QQzLChmBeJpaooSjlX8vI3a8ikgrSAQAkkNCMmgTyNZJBxbw5KS6CHEuSW-qKGVacGaLUudL9Mibkc1eWiCZ4-3CJ21_DSzG5cFsUjxxI_i6-f3C8jmnu_pi1PRafxJv5JevosUobNuRC8%3D)**

Planned Parenthood has continuously pushed egregious and pornographic materials in schools to young kids and teens -- and what do they "teach" these impressionable kids about sex? That disturbing practices are "normal" and "healthy."

In classic Planned Parenthood fashion, irrefutable definitions are warped, and morality is thrown out the window.

Planned Parenthood is the largest provider of sex education in America -- and they teach kids that gender is fluid, deviant sexual practices are normal and healthy, and anything goes, as long as it's consensual.

**We need to protect our children against Planned Parenthood 's deception. This deadly organization should not be the educator of our children. **

Friend of Life, this is why we at Live Action have been creating - and are about to release! - wholesome sex-ed video series for schools across the country to use instead of Planned Parenthood's damaging materials.

We need to spread the truth about loving relationships between men and women and the beauty of procreation before the next generation of parents is convinced by Planned Parenthood's disturbing agenda that leads to abortion.

**But we can 't complete this critical initiative without your support. Your gift of $50 will help us complete the videos and get them into schools across the country. Use this secure link to make your gift and kick Planned Parenthood out of the classroom! [https://give.liveaction.org/stop-planned-parenthood-mms/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=76c8ebdfb60b46079d385f8e93f4665f&_e=1Z9HgiHL7Jfu2-p52gw98y_ghcTnYbxsaPQhhb4G30oTol5_OJihCgBykS0gq1u3v0DpRAuswOrXGbuwWPfhJ44EfeN8Z7g_hsh_pPVNWZY1Rt19MsKtYDtgNbK-XfJWI_lFbJFrRMKjoym17DhZCb-eWYDKS1HyELwD68CtCJhV64_jfc6HZeonuhYy8HXZ-sR9AaPi29GV3rqVNmXuXnKzVVSQEYbpOqi38fQs957lpwDcpLtupGWcGL9xs6kiHaovjgoKX5cSBiVJvKwfkmCLBOCoo1VQyxDpCM9rvm6FiyzfAbmSSgSWaerKPgScP3FjNpeZvM4B6XEZJpvn6gaxQXBSwwRdDn6Dlk0k36I%3D)
**
Your partnership gives me so much hope. I can't wait to share the impact your activism will have in months to come. Our children - and grandchildren - depend on it.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=76c8ebdfb60b46079d385f8e93f4665f&_e=1Z9HgiHL7Jfu2-p52gw98y_ghcTnYbxsaPQhhb4G30oTol5_OJihCgBykS0gq1u3v0DpRAuswOrXGbuwWPfhJ44EfeN8Z7g_hsh_pPVNWZY1Rt19MsKtYDtgNbK-XfJWI_lFbJFrRMKjoym17DhZCb-eWYDKS1HyELwD68CtCJhV64_jfc6HZeonuhYy8HXZ-sR9AaPi29GV3rqVNmXuXpGtBck96uJevfC6NNHNY85RW2h-risAbziY-_mqkn5_bBAXayc5gTevTSXq23ZFaoO3vrknOhDuoDuY5u21gx70QlIT_zvNOr9UyGn5j-PmBMvzsG7T4QaZYa83-cJeHgW0z6dhXBQoIxTK0XvxX5Y%3D)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201
#

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for your journey to heaven?
body:
I often hear the question, “What will we do in heaven?”
I often hear the question, "What will we do in heaven?"
| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=d9be704d12a249fda45a8f2a7aabd989&_t=auloQ_biLMhaicrZrgTuxX_VuyvctTVLDOf_0pb3NvOu6GA5Y_Xr9Wb2FJjUCoT-Q1eYAKqrxewSfv_RChEksPdDda_BcIq11zV_9I0k_xkwkGgti_hkvs_WVUHYPDbb)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=d9be704d12a249fda45a8f2a7aabd989&_e=jFAS8y-2FxsVRod6s45KPvQock4nVS1tUabJ_jvcB6x74htsP_OcfrOwr6sHeoRm4Oe90etFgZ1UD2XZApICC_wAN1SsWOreiUwqV8HGmZKReLI4vosvqV2sbhuNGWweMv0DBj5H2BSe0gsWZnSFmDJTRpdNaD-xLe_A2HXdrLk29Lh2_8gKqMUxetx5PGqH3Ya_s5D0-q8_JP_EAVkWWb6OS5k3QYFE-_QY5JB0-cqXHoCW6uRwNwuGVJI2jVvOtT88vtVrB0W5BgEuagc0sUsn-C_-OCGL5wYNcylXxJADTjQb0JDU6s4DkTTmzlEs71yJDT8G8p35bM_V7U9tusEHa_lKXsa-_JzTJGmbCek-34uvf70Tuqkj-Ce-viqqYk2lgy7WqRczHJZO6VqOeNFAf4W-oiFAxSx5Namshkg%3D)
Hello Friend,

I often hear the question, "What will we do in heaven?" Many imagine heaven as a place where we sit around on clouds, strumming harps. But nothing could be further from the truth.

The Bible gives us glimpses of a heaven filled with purpose and activity. Revelation 22:3 says, "His servants will serve Him." We will have meaningful work, free from the frustration we often face here on earth. There will be no more exhaustion or stress, only joy, as we serve the Lord.

Heaven will also be a place of joyful worship. Revelation 5:13 gives us a picture of all creation joining together to sing praises to the Lamb who was slain. Can you imagine what it will be like to be part of that heavenly choir?

In A Place Called Heaven, I explore 10 surprising truths about your eternal home, pointing to what the Bible tells us about our eternal home.
* What Difference Does a Future Heaven Make in My Life Today?
* Is Heaven a Real Place or Is It a State of Mind?
* Have Some People Already Visited Heaven?
* Do Christians Immediately Go to Heaven When They Die?
* What Will We Do in Heaven?
* Do People in Heaven Know What is Happening on Earth?
* Will We Know One Another in Heaven?
* Will Heaven Be the Same for Everyone?
* Who Will Be in Heaven?
* How Can I Prepare for My Journey to Heaven?

This book offers hope, direction, and clarity about what awaits those who follow Jesus Christ.

I'd love to send you a copy as a thank-you for your generous gift of $25 or more to Pathway to Victory. Your support helps us continue to pierce the darkness of this world by sharing the light of God's Word with many who desperately need hope.

Click here to donate and receive your copy: [https://secure.ptv.org/a-place-called-heaven-generous-gift-1](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=d9be704d12a249fda45a8f2a7aabd989&_e=jFAS8y-2FxsVRod6s45KPvQock4nVS1tUabJ_jvcB6x74htsP_OcfrOwr6sHeoRm4Oe90etFgZ1UD2XZApICC_wAN1SsWOreiUwqV8HGmZKReLI4vosvqV2sbhuNGWweMv0DBj5H2BSe0gsWZnSFmDJTRpdNaD-xLe_A2HXdrLk29Lh2_8gKqMUxetx5PGqH3Ya_s5D0-q8_JP_EAVkWWb6OS5k3QYFE-_QY5JB0-cqXHoCW6uRwNwuGVJI2jVvOZwIzZzjd1dSDkrDCH6T07Tw7exmBOku_E9PHeKUGhgQP5o872NS4QWQubWKjC2ys5qcPidSWdVCbmsyRq69fVfzEKguPMWkJq3q4ugQxhVNsFrdjKREBd7_Xxk3BpJH9NtZiQ4i3kC11SnFIdw4z4Y8DV_BM3Q7w3bOmbc3zi_8%3D)

I hope this book creates in you excitement and anticipation for the eternal joy and purpose that awaits us in heaven.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

**President Trump did the UNTHINKABLE. **

And he's just getting started.

Would you **EVER HAVE GUESSED** that President Trump **NEARLY WON NEW JERSEY ... **coming within **JUST 5 POINTS?!**

After all...

**BIDEN won NJ by 16 points in 2020.**

**HILLARY won NJ by 14 points in 2016.**

**OBAMA won NJ by 18 points in 2012.**

**Heck, even GORE won NJ by 16 points back in 2000.**
**We 're watching HISTORY IN THE MAKING.**

Just like we saw over the last few years in Pennsylvania, we're watching New Jersey turn into the **NEXT SWING STATE** right before our eyes!
Our next Governor's election is November 2025... less than a **YEAR AWAY ...**

**... and IT IS WINNABLE... **

If I can count on you to help us build a ground game that can turn out conservative voters.

Help **HARNESS** President Trump's momentum and **FLIP NEW JERSEY >>**

**< < FLIP NEW JERSEY RED >>**

President Trump **WON** Pennsylvania by registering **THOUSANDS** of new voters...

and mobilizing **EVERY** voter in **EVERY** corner of the state.

**It took A WHOLE LOT of HARD WORK ... **

but we can **REPLICATE** that success **RIGHT HERE** in New Jersey.

I'm ready to take the reins on this fight.

In 2025, I'm going to build a tremendous ground game and America First **TURNOUT MACHINE.**
And once I'm Governor, I **WILL** make sure the next Republican Presidential nominee gets **FULL** access... so he can **BUILD** on **OUR** victory and **FLIP THIS STATE** in the Electoral College.

We **MADE IT HAPPEN** in Pennsylvania by **WORKING TOGETHER.**

We **CAN AND WILL** do it in New Jersey too... if we can count on the support of patriots from across the nation.

**Are YOU in?**

**< < FLIP NEW JERSEY and CRUSH the Far-Left >>**

Thanks!

Bill Spadea

Hi Friend,
Millions of Americans feel like no matter how many stretches, supplements, or pills they take... their achy joints just never seem to get better.
Most doctors blame old injuries, poor genetics, and more often than not — just "getting older."
However, breakthrough Harvard research recently discovered something shocking:
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zr1ugzAQwPGnMVuQff6CwUPbiAz9kDqlnSpjH8GtnRBDiPL2FVHEZMn30_3PpiGG7maIfiYAffAjASD8iQCcv68pX37T626TeITNWX0kuUzh5UFnWPHR2Sh2zefXIezHQ7vt397P-5mtfLoNuOJHtMRkQ1x-9bbwhneeigIN05xVla6kKnoD4Lzw1msFdYuq5c5XVGiLqKRygEUwQEEwxjRwqWRdulqhpBprkK3vAIig905pE-bgLBunq835dEqlO6Uimn6ahvF-WEOgcfGvjGHGwYZjlxEXRKBhtGJ8eZlYHG8uU_qZMCfCt34osvHDNcQYRqWJoId7cFk_G_gPAAD___LEabc) Many so-called "health foods" may actually be the root cause behind those sore, stiff joints that make you feel miserable...
And the worst “health food” of all of them is actually one extremely common type of protein that's likely in your refrigerator right now.
Researchers say this protein can actually trigger a vicious cycle of out-of-control inflammation in your joints, and even harm your immune system.
